This underspecification is the root of the well-known false-negative problem and leaves current models unable to tell a precise query from an ambiguous one. We reframe CIR as calibrated intent resolution under uncertainty: a retriever is wrapped in a conformal prediction layer that returns a candidate set with a coverage guarantee and whose size is a principled measure of ambiguity; when the set is large, an expected-information-gain policy asks the single most useful clarifying question, drawn from interpretable ambiguity axes, and the set contracts. We introduce AmbiCIR, a benchmark and human-validated user simulator that revive the dormant auxiliary and dialogue annotations of CIRR and extend the multiple-positive setting of CIRCO. Across open-domain and fashion benchmarks our method matches single-turn state of the art, confirming calibrated resolution is cost-free on precise queries, while reaching the intended target in a fraction of the interaction budget required by naive conversational baselines, and it is the first to report valid coverage and calibration for the task.

</details>


### [75] [DisDop: Distillation with Domain Priors for Open-Vocabulary Aerial Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24639)
*Ruihao Xu,Yong Liu,Yansong Tang,Sule Bai,Xubing Ye,Bingyao Yu,Yutao Guo,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DisDop框架，通过从遥感基础模型（RemoteCLIP和DINOv3）中蒸馏多级领域先验知识，解决了开放词汇航空图像检测中因视角差异和数据稀缺导致的性能不足问题，在多个基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的开放词汇检测方法主要针对自然图像设计，直接应用于无人机视角的航空图像效果不佳。虽然有研究尝试从预训练模型迁移知识，但这些模型仍基于自然图像训练，忽视了专门为遥感/航空影像设计的基础模型的潜力。

Method: 提出DisDop统一框架，包含：(1) 视觉先验蒸馏：通过教师融合策略结合RemoteCLIP的跨模态对齐能力和DINOv3的细粒度局部特征提取能力；(2) 文本先验蒸馏：从RemoteCLIP的文本编码器中提取类别间语义关系；(3) 全局上下文先验蒸馏：增强小目标的局部特征表示。

Result: 在开放词汇航空检测基准上达到新的SOTA性能，消融实验验证了各模块的合理性和有效性。

Conclusion: 通过多级先验蒸馏框架，有效利用了遥感基础模型的领域知识，显著提升了开放词汇航空目标检测的性能。

Abstract: With the widespread application of drones in recent years, object detection of aerial images has attracted increasing attention, especially open-vocabulary aerial detection which is not restricted to predefined categories. Due to the scarcity of drone's viewpoint images and their significant differences from natural images, it is difficult to achieve satisfying results by directly applying vanilla open-vocabulary detection methods designed for natural scenarios. Some studies propose to transfer knowledge from pre-trained models by using lightweight networks or generating pseudo labels, but they tend to rely on models trained on natural images, neglecting the potential of foundation models specifically tailored for remote sensing and aerial imagery. To address this limitation, we propose DisDop, a unified framework that systematically distills multi-level domain priors from remote sensing foundation models (e.g., RemoteCLIP and DINOv3) into a lightweight detector. Specifically, we first distill visual priors through a teacher fusion strategy that combines RemoteCLIP's cross-modal alignment capability with DINOv3's fine-grained local feature extraction ability, transferring their complementary strengths to the detector's backbone. Second, we distill textual priors embedded in RemoteCLIP's text encoder by explicitly modeling inter-category semantic relationships, while incorporating global contextual priors to enhance local feature representation for small objects. Through this multi-level prior distillation framework, our DisDop achieves new state-of-the-art performance on open-vocabulary aerial detection benchmarks. Extensive ablation analysis also demonstrates the rationality and effectiveness of our proposed modules.

</details>


### [76] [Understanding the Impact of Geometric Foundation Models on Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24642)
*Yurou Yang,Muyuan Lin,Roberto Martin-Martin,Martin Labrie,Shreekant Gayaka,Cheng-Hao Kuo,Luca Carlone*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统性地分析了VLA（视觉-语言-动作模型）在几何理解上的不足，并通过集成GFM（几何基础模型）来弥补这一"几何鸿沟"。作者在GR00T-N1.5和VGGT框架下，量化了VLA的几何缺陷，提出了三种不同的几何注入架构，并分析了非架构因素（训练数据、相机数量、重建质量）对性能的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作将VLAs与GFMs结合（如VGGT）展现出了性能提升，但存在三个未明确的问题：(i)现代VLAs本身是否已具备足够的几何理解能力；(ii)将几何信息注入VLA的最佳架构是什么；(iii)其他设计选择如何影响几何VLA的性能。本文旨在通过严格实验分析来回答这些问题。

Method: 本文以GR00T-N1.5（VLA）和VGGT（GFM）为具体研究对象。首先，通过线性探测（linear probing）量化VLAs与GFMs之间的"几何鸿沟"，这是首次对两者差距进行定量分析。其次，设计了三种不同的架构策略来融合GFM与VLA，保持底层实现细节尽可能一致以确保公平比较。最后，分析非架构因素（训练数据、相机数量、重建质量等）对几何VLA性能的影响。

Result: (1)通过线性探测定量证实了现有VLAs在几何理解上存在显著"几何鸿沟"；(2)识别并比较了三种不同的几何注入架构策略；(3)揭示了训练数据、相机数量、重建质量等非架构因素对几何VLA性能的具体影响。

Conclusion: 本文通过严谨的实验分析，首次量化了VLAs与GFMs之间的几何鸿沟，提出了三种公平比较的几何注入架构，并揭示了影响几何VLA性能的关键非架构设计因素，为未来几何VLAs的发展提供了系统性的指导方向。

Abstract: Recent work explores new opportunities at the intersection of vision-language-action models (VLAs) and geometric foundation models (GFMs) for 3D reconstruction, such as VGGT. While the resulting geometric VLAs often show improved performance, it remains unclear (i) if modern VLAs already have sufficient geometric understanding to start with, (ii) what is the best architecture to inject geometric understanding into a VLA, and (iii) what is the effect of other design choices that affect geometric VLAs. In this paper we provide a rigorous experimental analysis to shed light on these questions, for a specific choice of VLA (GR00T-N1.5) and GFM (VGGT). Our first contribution is to formalize prior work's intuition that current VLAs lack geometric understanding, by providing a rigorous analysis based on linear probing. The analysis quantifies, for the first time, the "geometric gap" between VLAs and GFMs. Our second contribution is to identify and compare different strategies to bridge GFMs with VLAs. We implement three different architectures, which differ in the way they inject geometry in the VLA, while keeping low-level implementation details as similar as possible, to ensure a fair comparison. Finally, we analyze the impact of non-architectural choices (e.g., training data, number of cameras, reconstruction quality) on the performance of the geometric VLAs.

</details>


### [77] [Reasoning to Align: Implicit Reasoning in Diffusion Transformers for Video Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24674)
*Yan Li,Lin Liu,Xiaopeng Zhang,Qi Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出RVEDiT框架，通过粒度路由令牌条件和参考锚定注意力对齐两项技术，解决了Diffusion Transformer在指令视频编辑中条件信号无差别输入和注意力模式监督不足的问题，在多个基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DiT编辑模型存在两个结构性缺陷：(1)条件信号无差别地输入所有Transformer块，迫使单一令牌流同时编码全局编辑意图和细粒度视觉证据；(2)控制编辑的交叉注意力模式仅通过像素级重构间接监督，模型内部推理过程约束不足。

Method: 提出RVEDiT框架，包含两个互补组件：(1)粒度路由令牌条件（GRTC）——从多模态大模型提取可学习的编辑令牌并将其路由至浅层块，保留原生视觉和文本令牌给深层块，实现从粗到细的编辑过程；(2)参考锚定注意力对齐（RAAA）——训练时使用参数共享的参考分支，最大化编辑分支与参考分支注意力特征间的互信息，无需额外推理成本。

Result: 在标准指令视频编辑基准上，RVEDiT一致优于最先进的基线方法，在局部编辑和组合编辑任务上尤其表现突出。

Conclusion: 通过对DiT内部推理过程的结构性约束，RVEDiT有效解决了令牌流冲突和注意力监督不足两大问题，为指令视频编辑提供了一种高效且无需额外推理开销的改进方案。

Abstract: Instruction-based video editing requires transforming a source video according to a natural-language instruction while preserving irrelevant content and remaining temporally coherent. We argue that existing Diffusion Transformer (DiT) editors struggle with this task for two structural reasons. First, conditioning signals are fed undifferentiated into all transformer blocks, forcing a single token stream to encode both global editing intent and fine-grained visual evidence. Second, the cross-attention patterns that govern the edit are supervised only indirectly through pixel-level reconstruction, leaving the model's internal reasoning process under-constrained. To address both limitations, we propose RVEDiT, an implicit Reasoning Video Editing DiT framework built around two complementary components. The first, Granularity-Routed Token Conditioning, introduces learnable editing tokens distilled from a multimodal LLM and routes them to shallow blocks, while reserving native visual and textual tokens for deeper blocks, thereby inducing a coarse-to-fine editing process inside the backbone. The second, Reference-Anchored Attention Alignment, employs a parameter-sharing reference branch during training and maximizes the mutual information between the attention features of the editing and reference branches, regularizing the model's internal reasoning without incurring any additional inference cost. Experiments on standard instruction-based video editing benchmarks show that RVEDiT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with particularly strong gains on localized and compositional edits.

</details>


### [78] [VaaWIT: Visual-Aware Adaptation of Large Language Models for Multilingual Web Image Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24675)
*Bo Li,Ronghao Chen,Ningyuan Deng,Huacan Wang,Shaolin Zhu,Lijie Wen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出VaaWIT框架，通过双流注意力模块和视觉感知适配器，将细粒度视觉信息融入大语言模型，实现多语言网页图片翻译，性能超越开源SOTA并接近商业模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网页图片中的文本翻译对提升内容可访问性和跨语言信息检索至关重要，但现有LVLM存在视觉表征鸿沟——标准编码器侧重高层语义而忽略细粒度视觉细节，难以识别多样化的字符形态。

Method: 提出VaaWIT端到端框架：(1) 双流注意力模块(DSAM)，实现多语言语义特征与细粒度视觉表示的双向交互；(2) 视觉感知适配器(VAA)，以参数高效方式将融合后的视觉线索动态注入冻结的LLM骨干网络。

Result: 在三个公开基准的八项任务上，VaaWIT显著优于开源SOTA基线，并达到与商业模型竞争的绩效。

Conclusion: 验证了将细粒度视觉感知集成到LLM中用于复杂网页内容分析的有效性。

Abstract: Translating text embedded in Web images is crucial for improving content accessibility and cross-lingual information retrieval, particularly within social media and e-commerce domains. Although Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced multimodal understanding, applying them to Web image translation remains challenging due to the visual representation gap: standard encoders often prioritize high-level semantics over the fine-grained visual details required for recognizing diverse character morphologies. To address this challenge, we propose VaaWIT, an end-to-end framework that adapts Large Language Models for multilingual Web image translation. The framework introduces two key technical contributions: (1) a Dual-Stream Attention Module (DSAM), which facilitates bidirectional interaction between multilingual semantic features and detailed visual representations, thereby synthesizing unified features robust to textual variations; and (2) a Visual-Aware Adapter (VAA), a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy that dynamically injects these fused visual cues into the frozen LLM backbone. This design enables the model to align the visual context with linguistic reasoning effectively while minimizing computational costs. Extensive experiments on eight tasks on three public benchmarks demonstrate that VaaWIT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) open-source baselines and achieves competitive performance against proprietary models. These results validate the efficacy of integrating fine-grained visual perception into LLMs for complex Web content analysis.

</details>


### [79] [MindAdapter: Few-Shot Parameter-Efficient Residual Calibration of Cross-Subject Brain-to-Visual Decoding Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24679)
*Jiaxiang Liu,Jiawei Du,Xupeng Chen,Guoqi Li,Jiang Cai,Simon Fong,Mingkun Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MindAdapter提出了一种参数高效的少样本校准框架，通过解耦的线性-残差级联对齐范式（冻结预训练的跨被试对齐骨干+轻量级非线性残差适配器）和拓扑锚定的双流流形约束，仅需少量共享刺激即可显著提升跨被试脑到视觉的解码性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨被试脑到视觉解码面临严重的个体间变异性，导致系统性的功能不对齐，现有方法难以在保持全局表征的同时高效适应个体差异。

Method: 1) 解耦线性-残差级联对齐：冻结预训练的显式脑功能对齐骨干（粗粒度），引入轻量级非线性残差适配器（细粒度），分离全局跨被试对应关系与个体残差校正。2) 拓扑锚定双流流形约束：共享刺激作为拓扑锚点提供体素级配对监督，语义流通过冻结的视觉-语言解码器在未配对脑数据上保持一致性。

Result: 在Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD)上，MindAdapter仅需少量共享刺激即可显著提升跨被试视觉重建和检索的准确性。

Conclusion: MindAdapter提供了一种实用且数据高效的个人化脑到视觉解码方案，有效平衡了全局表征稳定性和个体特异性校正。

Abstract: Cross-subject brain-to-visual decoding remains a core challenge in brain-computer interfaces due to severe inter-individual variability that induces systematic subject-specific functional misalignment. To address this issue, we propose MindAdapter, a parameter-efficient few-shot calibration framework for pretrained brain-to-visual decoding models. MindAdapter adopts a decoupled linear-residual cascade alignment paradigm by freezing a pretrained explicit brain functional alignment backbone (coarse) and introducing a lightweight nonlinear residual adapter (fine), thereby disentangling global cross-subject correspondence from subject-specific residual corrections for fine-grained spatial and semantic calibration. To further preserve global representational stability, we design a topology-anchored dual-stream manifold constraint, where a small set of shared stimuli serves as topological pins with voxel-level paired supervision, while a semantic stream enforces consistency through a frozen vision-language decoder on unpaired brain data. Together, MindAdapter efficiently injects subject-specific corrections while maintaining the global representational geometry learned during pretraining. Experiments on the Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD) demonstrate that MindAdapter substantially improves cross-subject visual reconstruction and retrieval accuracy using only a few shared stimuli, offering a practical and data-efficient solution for personalized brain-to-visual decoding.

</details>


### [80] [HoloFair: Unified T2I Fairness Evaluation and Fair-GRPO Debiasing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24687)
*Ruyi Chen,Lu Zhou,Xiaogang Xu,Chiyu Zhang,Jiafei Wu,Liming Fang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出 HoloFair，一个面向文本到图像模型的多维人口统计偏差分析与去偏框架，包含大规模公平性数据集、SpaFreq 属性分类器、MGBI 评估指标以及基于强化学习的去偏方法 Fair-GRPO，在 SD3.5-Medium 模型上有效提升了多维公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 T2I 模型虽然视觉质量和语义一致性进步显著，但常常放大社会偏见；且已有评估方法仅处理单一维度偏见，缺乏在深层语义层面发现模型偏见的能力。

Method: 构建大规模公平性数据集和 SpaFreq（Spatial-Frequency）属性分类器；提出多维分组偏见指数 MGBI 来评估内在多样性和条件偏见；引入基于强化学习的 Fair-GRPO 方法，通过多目标奖励函数调整生成模型分布以实现去偏。

Result: 在 SD3.5-Medium 模型上的实验表明，Fair-GRPO 在保持高图像质量的同时显著提升了多维公平性；论文还分析了潜在的奖励破解现象并提供了缓解策略。

Conclusion: HoloFair 为 T2I 模型的公平性评估与去偏提供了全面的基准框架，并在实际模型中验证了其有效性。

Abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) models have made significant strides in visual realism and semantic consistency, yet they often perpetuate and amplify societal biases. Existing evaluation methods typically address only single-dimensional biases, lacking perspectives to uncover model biases at social-related deeper semantic levels. We introduce HoloFair, a comprehensive benchmark framework for multidimensional demographic bias analysis. Built upon our large-scale fairness-oriented dataset and the SpaFreq (Spatial-Frequency) attribute classifier, this framework proposes the Multi-attribute, Group-wise Bias Index (MGBI) metric, designed to assess both intrinsic diversity and conditional biases. Beyond evaluation, we further introduce Fair-GRPO, a reinforcement-learning-based debiasing method that alters the distribution of generative models through a designed multi-objective reward function. E.g., experiments on the SD3.5-Medium model demonstrate that Fair-GRPO significantly improves multidimensional fairness while maintaining high image quality. We also analyze potential reward hacking phenomena and provide corresponding mitigation strategies. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/1059684669/HoloFair

</details>


### [81] [AdaFuse-Det: Adaptive Cross-Modal Fusion of Event Cameras for Robust Object Detection in Low-Light RGB Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24691)
*Raju Imandi,Chethana B,Bharatesh Chakravarthi,Yong-Guk Kim,Manipriya S,Pavan Kumar B N*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdaFuse-Det 是一种融合 CLAHE 增强 RGB 和事件相机数据的双流检测框架，通过自适应跨模态融合模块在极低光照下实现鲁棒目标检测，在 LLE-VOS 基准上 Recall 65.54%、Precision 53.85%、F1 59.12%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极低光照条件下传统 RGB 相机性能急剧下降，而事件相机具有高动态范围、微秒级响应和光照不变性等互补优势，融合两者可解决夜间监控、搜救机器人等实际场景中的可靠目标检测问题。

Method: 提出双流架构 AdaFuse-Det，一条流处理经 CLAHE 增强的 RGB 帧，另一条流处理体素化的事件张量；通过自适应跨模态融合模块基于最小方差线性估计理论学习注意力图，理论证明了该注意力图渐进恢复 Gauss-Markov 最优融合权重，并建立了事件守恒和体素化时间分辨率界限。

Result: 在 LLE-VOS 基准上，严重光照退化条件下 Recall 65.54%、Precision 53.85%、F1-Score 59.12%，在 Recall 上显著优于单模态检测器，验证了理论预测的光照自适应行为。

Conclusion: AdaFuse-Det 有效融合 RGB 与事件数据，理论上证明了跨模态融合的最优性，实验验证了极端低光环境下的性能优势，为低光照目标检测提供了一种有理论保证的实用方案。

Abstract: Detecting objects reliably under extreme low-light conditions is an open problem in computer vision, with practical urgency in applications ranging from nighttime surveillance to search-and-rescue robotics. Conventional RGB cameras degrade sharply at low photon flux, while event cameras which record asynchronous per-pixel brightness changes at microsecond resolution and high dynamic range provide complementary structural cues that are largely illumination-invariant. We present AdaFuse-Det, a dual-stream framework that fuses CLAHE-enhanced RGB frames with voxelized event tensors through an Adaptive Cross-Modal Fusion (ACMF) module grounded in minimum-variance linear estimation theory. We formally show that the learned attention map asymptotically recovers the Gauss-Markov optimal fusion weights, and establish event conservation and temporal resolution bounds for the voxelization stage. On the LLE-VOS benchmark, AdaFuse-Det achieves a Recall of $65.54\%$, Precision of $53.85\%$, and F1-Score of $59.12\%$ under severe illumination degradation, outperforming single-modality detectors in recall by a margin that reflects the theoretically predicted illumination-adaptation behavior.

</details>


### [82] [SRUG: Shadow-Guided Relightable Urban Scene with Generation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24700)
*Yonghao Zhao,Zexin Yin,Jian Yang,Beibei Wang,Jin Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SRUG框架，利用阴影引导3D补全模型恢复不可见区域几何，结合迭代材质分解和物理光照模型，实现城市场景可靠重光照，效果优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市场景重光照高度不适定：环境无界且存在大量不可见区域，这些区域会向可见区域投射阴影；同时稀疏输入和复杂光照导致材质分解存在严重歧义。现有方法难以合理建模不可见区域的阴影。

Method: 1) 阴影引导的3D补全模型，恢复不可见区域几何以生成物理合理的阴影；2) 迭代材质分解方案，利用大材质模型(LMM)提供材质监督，逐步分解场景材质属性；3) 基于物理的光照模型，捕捉城市场景复杂光照。

Result: 大量定量评估和视觉对比表明，在新视角合成和重光照两个任务上均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SRUG通过阴影引导几何补全和迭代材质分解，有效解决了城市场景重光照中不可见区域阴影建模和材质分解模糊的难题，实现了更可靠的城市场景重光照。

Abstract: Creating relightable urban scenes from images or videos is widely useful but highly ill-posed. Urban environments are typically unbounded and extend beyond the visible regions. As a result, many portions of the scene remain unobserved, yet these invisible regions can cast shadows onto visible areas. Reasonably modeling shadows cast by such invisible regions is challenging and poses a significant obstacle to creating relightable urban scenes. At the same time, sparse input views and complex illumination conditions further complicate relighting, as they introduce severe ambiguities in material decomposition. In this paper, we propose Shadow-guided Relightable Urban Scene with Generation model (SRUG), a novel framework designed to address relighting challenges in urban scenes. SRUG leverages shadows to guide a 3D completion model for recovering the geometry of invisible regions, promoting the synthesis of physically reasonable shadows. In addition, SRUG employs an iterative material decomposition scheme that applies the large material model (LMM) to provide material supervision and iteratively decompose the scene's material properties, enabling robust material decomposition. Building upon these components, we introduce a physically-based lighting model that captures the complex illumination of urban scenes and supports reliable relighting. Extensive quantitative evaluations and visual comparisons demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches in both novel view synthesis and relighting tasks.

</details>


### [83] [Do Image-Text Metrics Respect Semantic Invariances?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24702)
*Amit Agarwal,Hitesh Laxmichand Patel,Meizhu Liu,Jyotika Singh,Karan Dua,Hansa Meghwani,Matthew Rowe,Michael Avendi,Yassi Abbasi,Tao Sheng,Sujith Ravi,Dan Roth*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了五种主流无参考图像-文本评估器在语义不变扰动下的鲁棒性，发现它们对空间变换、物体变化和语言框架调整存在显著敏感性（评分波动约6-9%），并可能导致高达37%的排名翻转。作者提出了一种事后校准方法，可将敏感性降低约一半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像-文本评估器虽被广泛使用，但缺乏对语义不变性（即语义不变但表面形式变化的样本应得分相近）的系统检验，本研究旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 在三维扰动（空间、物体、社会语言框架）下对五种评估器进行探针测试，结合人工验证，并提出基于不变性校准的后处理评分方法。

Result: 评估器对非语义变化敏感，评分波动约6-9%，可导致37%的排名翻转；校准方法将中位数绝对敏感性减半，同时保持与原始评估器的相关性。

Conclusion: 当前无参考评估器缺乏语义不变性，需通过校准或重新设计来提升其可靠性。

Abstract: Reference-free image-to-text evaluators are now standard for scoring image-caption alignment, yet it is unclear whether they respect semantic invariances. We present an invariance probe on five popular evaluators (CLIPScore, PAC-S, UMIC, FLEUR, and a deterministic LLM judge) under semantics-preserving perturbations along three axes -- spatial (flips, context-preserving repositioning, light rotations), object (scale, category), and socio-linguistic framing (cultural/economic adjectives with neutral and length-matched controls). Across curated slices of three detection datasets and three caption evaluation suites, we find consistent non-semantic sensitivities, where benign spatial edits and simple phrasing changes shift scores by $\approx$6--9\% on average, and for systems separated by just 0.7\%, these shifts can cause ranking flips in up to $\sim$37\% of cases, particularly under spatial changes. A small human study also supports this finding and confirms that annotators generally judge perturbed pairs as equally correct, so these shifts reflect metric behavior rather than semantic change. We further propose invariance-calibrated scoring, a post-hoc adjustment that roughly halves median absolute sensitivity while retaining correlation with learned caption evaluators.

</details>


### [84] [Physics-Guided Self-Supervised Statistical Residual Learning for Sonar Despeckling with Improved Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24716)
*Swapna Pillai,Siddharth Singh Savner,Sujit Kumar Sahoo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种物理信息引导的自监督声纳图像去斑框架，通过在同态对数域中约束对数比残差服从乘性散斑统计特性，无需干净标签即可实现去斑，并在多个真实声纳数据集上达到SOTA性能，适合实时部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 声纳图像受乘性散斑噪声污染，现有监督方法依赖成对干净图像（难以获取），而无监督方法易产生退化恒等解，亟需一种无需干净标签且能保持结构保真度的去斑方法。

Method: 1) 将去斑问题重构为同态对数域中的残差一致性约束；2) 设计方差目标统计损失约束对数比残差服从乘性散斑统计；3) 引入边缘感知结构正则化；4) 使用中值引导的课程学习策略稳定训练过程；5) 采用轻量级神经网络实现。

Result: 在多个真实声纳数据集上取得SOTA性能，跨数据集鲁棒性优异，且满足实时部署需求。

Conclusion: 物理信息引导的自监督框架有效解决了声纳图像去斑中缺乏干净标签的问题，在散斑抑制与结构保真度之间取得良好平衡，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: This letter introduces a physics-informed self-supervised framework for sonar image despeckling that reformulates despeckling as residual consistency in the homomorphic log domain. By constraining the log-ratio residual to obey multiplicative speckle statistics, the proposed method eliminates the need for clean supervision while preventing degenerate identity solutions. A variance-targeted statistical loss combined with edge-aware structural regularization and median-guided curriculum stabilization enables effective speckle suppression with preserved structural fidelity. This formulation along with a lightweight neural network achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple real sonar datasets and demonstrates excellent cross-dataset robustness, while remaining suitable for real-time deployment.

</details>


### [85] [Calibrating Probabilistic Object Detectors with Annotator Disagreement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24722)
*Zhi Qin Tan,Owen Addison,Yunpeng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需真实标签、仅依靠多标注者标注分布来校准概率目标检测器的方法，使模型能表达有意义的预测不确定性，并在医学和自然图像数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目标检测任务中，不同标注者对模糊对象（如医学图像）的标注存在高度分歧，缺乏客观的真实标签。现有检测器都隐式依赖真实标签，无法处理这种模糊性。作者希望解决：1）如何在没有客观真实标签的情况下，利用多标注者标注学习目标检测器；2）如何使检测器在检测模糊对象时表达有意义的模型预测不确定性。

Method: 提出一个可解释的校准框架：1）设计四个评估指标来衡量分类和定位的校准误差；2）提出训练时校准和后处理校准器；3）将类别置信度和边界框方差估计与标注者的标注分布对齐；4）可泛化到YOLO家族和两阶段检测器等现有概率检测器。

Result: 在真实和合成数据集（医学和自然图像）上，使用三种主流目标检测器进行实验，结果表明所提框架优于对比方法。

Conclusion: 成功提出了一种无需真实标签即可校准概率目标检测器的通用框架，能有效处理标注歧义，使模型同时实现准确检测和不确定性表达。

Abstract: High degrees of disagreement among annotators can exist for ambiguous objects, e.g. in medical images, underscoring the challenges of establishing ground truth annotations in object detection tasks. Despite this, all existing object detectors implicitly require access to ground truth annotations for either training or evaluation. The fundamental questions we target are: How can we learn an object detector with multiple annotators' annotations but without objective ground truth annotations due to object ambiguity, and how can we enable the learned detector to express meaningful model predictive uncertainties in detecting ambiguous objects? To answer these questions, we present an interpretable approach to calibrate probabilistic object detectors, where the calibration goal is to align the class confidence and bounding box variance estimates to the annotators' annotation distribution. We introduce an efficient yet effective framework to calibrate probabilistic object detectors by designing four evaluation metrics to measure calibration errors regarding classification and localization, and proposing a train-time calibration and post-hoc calibrator, all without the need to access any ground truth. This framework is generalizable to many existing probabilistic object detectors, such as the YOLO families and two-stage detectors. Empirical results with real-world and synthetic datasets of medical and natural images demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed framework with three popular object detectors.

</details>


### [86] [From Full Boards to Tiny Defects: Scale-Aware Tile Inference with Topology-Aware Merging for High-Resolution PCB Defect Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24726)
*Mohammad Alijanpour Shalmani,Alale Rezvani Boroujeni,Ali Amini,Jiann Shiun Yuan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了五种高分辨率PCB缺陷检测推理策略，提出了一种无需训练的后处理方法——拓扑感知图块合并（TA-TM），通过构建图块邻接图并利用相邻图块一致性调整边界敏感检测分数，有效解决了图块推理中的边界伪影问题，在两个数据集上将边界区域召回率从~26-63%提升至~70-100%，并恢复了全图方法遗漏的46-100%小缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率PCB全板图像缩放到标准检测器输入时出现分辨率坍缩，微尺度缺陷缩小到几个像素而被漏检；图块推理虽保留局部细节但引入图块边界伪影，导致分割检测和假阴性，亟需系统比较不同推理策略并解决边界问题。

Method: 系统比较五种推理策略；证明训练-推理尺度一致性至关重要；提出拓扑感知图块合并（TA-TM），构建图块邻接图，利用邻接图块一致性调整边界敏感检测分数，再执行全局NMS。

Result: 训练-推理尺度不一致时mAP@50仅0.01；640*640图块训练分别达到0.72和0.94；128px重叠将边界召回率从~26-63%提升至~70-100%；TA-TM在两个基准上取得最佳mAP@50；图块推理恢复全图方法遗漏的46-100%小缺陷。

Conclusion: TA-TM无需重新训练且与架构无关，可直接应用于现有PCB检测流水线，具有良好的泛化性和实用性。

Abstract: High-resolution printed circuit board (PCB) inspection suffers from resolution collapse when full-board images are resized to standard detector inputs: micro-scale defects shrink to a few pixels and are missed. Tile-based inference preserves local detail but introduces boundary artefacts at tile edges, causing split detections and false negatives. We present a systematic comparison of five inference strategies evaluated on two high-resolution PCB defect datasets, PCB-Defect (230 images, 1704 annotations) and HRIPCB (693 images, 2 953 annotations), spanning six defect classes. We show that training-inference scale consistency is critical: a detector trained on full images collapses to mAP@50 = 0.01 under tile inference, while the same architecture trained on 640*640 tile crops achieves 0.72 and 0.94 on the two datasets respectively. We further exploited Topology-Aware Tile Merging (TA-TM), a training-free post-processing method that builds a tile-adjacency graph and adjusts boundary-sensitive detection scores using neighbour-tile agreement before global NMS. Across both datasets, adding 128 px tile overlap raises boundary-zone recall from ~26-63% to ~70-100%, TA-TM achieves the best mAP@50 on both benchmarks, and tile inference recovers 46-100% of small defects missed entirely by full-image methods. Results are consistent across datasets, confirming the generalizability of the proposed strategy. TA-TM requires no retraining and is architecture-agnostic, making it directly applicable to existing PCB inspection pipelines.

</details>


### [87] [Ghosts in the Point Clouds: De-glaring LiDAR in the Transient Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24753)
*Avery Gump,Connor Henley,Sungjin Cheong,Akarsh Prabhakara,Mohit Gupta*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对固态LiDAR因内部多径反射产生的眩光伪影问题，提出了基于瞬态眩光扩散函数（TGSF）的物理模型和免训练算法，在真实单光子LiDAR上实现了严重眩光伪影的有效抑制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固态LiDAR的小型化虽然带来了可扩展性、低成本等优势，但引入了内部多径眩光这一新的严重故障模式，导致点云中出现"鬼影"、遮挡真实物体，造成安全关键问题。现有方法缺乏对这一效应的系统性建模与高效处理手段。

Method: 提出瞬态眩光扩散函数（TGSF）作为线性、场景无关的算子来描述内部眩光效应；在此模型基础上，开发了一种无需训练的算法，在点云形成前直接对低层级LiDAR检测信号进行处理，利用眩光扩散函数的先验知识判断每个检测源于眩光的概率。

Result: 在真实单光子LiDAR硬件上的实验表明，该方法能够有效抑制严重眩光伪影，同时保留真实场景结构，且兼容现有LiDAR信号处理流水线，可直接部署于未经修改的商业传感器。

Conclusion: 本文建立的物理模型和算法为固态LiDAR内部眩光问题提供了实用解决方案，在不改变硬件的前提下显著提升了点云质量与安全性。

Abstract: Modern LiDARs are rapidly transitioning from bulky, mechanically scanned systems to ultra-compact, low-cost, solid-state arrays. This miniaturization-while enabling scalability, affordability, and camera-like data structures-introduces a new and severe failure mode: internal-multipath glare. When light from a bright or retroreflective surface reflects and scatters within the LiDAR, light that should reach a single pixel spreads across the pixel array. The resulting artifacts create phantom objects, obscure real ones, and produce safety-critical "ghosts in the point clouds." This paper introduces a physically grounded sensing model and algorithmic techniques for addressing this effect. We show that internal glare can be represented as a linear, scene-independent operator-the Transient Glare Spread Function (TGSF)-acting on the transient measurements. Building on this model, we develop a training-free approach that operates on low-level LiDAR detections (or echoes) prior to point-cloud formation, leveraging knowledge of the glare spread function to reason about the likelihood of each detection arising from glare. The resulting approach is compatible with existing LiDAR signal-processing pipelines, and deployable on unmodified commercial sensors. Using experiments with real single-photon LiDAR hardware, we demonstrate substantial suppression of severe glare artifacts while preserving true scene structure.

</details>


### [88] [Motion-Compensated Weight Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24754)
*Ismail Lamaakal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出运动补偿权重压缩（MCWC），通过对齐置换对称块、利用层间冗余进行预测编码，在率-精度帕累托前沿上超越现有量化与学习型权重编解码方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有压缩方法逐层独立处理权重，忽略了函数保持对称性（如置换对称）导致的跨层冗余，而权重已成为部署瓶颈。

Method: (1) 对齐置换对称块（隐藏单元、注意力头）最大化跨层对应关系；(2) 在对齐坐标系中使用轻量层序预测器（含周期性关键帧）；(3) 对量化预测残差用学习型熵模型编码；(4) 解码端通过熵解码、反量化、预测重建和逆对齐恢复权重。

Result: 在Transformer语言建模和视觉分类任务上，MCWC在率-精度帕累托前沿上优于强量化和学习型权重编解码基线，且解码时间具有竞争力；消融实验验证对齐、预测、熵建模和关键帧调度均不可或缺。

Conclusion: 利用置换对称性对齐实现跨层预测编码是有效的权重压缩新范式，代码已开源。

Abstract: Neural network weights are increasingly a bottleneck for deployment, yet most compression pipelines treat layers independently and overlook cross-layer redundancy induced by function-preserving symmetries. We propose Motion-Compensated Weight Compression (MCWC), a weight-only codec that aligns permutation-symmetric blocks (e.g., hidden units and attention heads) to maximize cross-layer correspondence, turning depth into a predictable sequence. In the aligned coordinate system, MCWC uses a lightweight layer-sequential predictor with periodic keyframes and encodes only quantized prediction residuals using a learned entropy model trained under a rate distortion objective. A simple decoder reconstructs deployable weights by entropy decoding, dequantization, predictor-driven reconstruction, and inverse alignment, enabling fast weight materialization for inference. Across Transformer language modeling and vision classification, MCWC improves the rate accuracy Pareto frontier over strong quantization and learned weight-codec baselines, while maintaining competitive decode time. Ablations confirm that alignment, prediction, entropy modeling, and keyframe scheduling are each necessary for the full gains. Our code is available via https://github.com/Ism-ail11/MCWC.

</details>


### [89] [Drift-Resistant Navigation World Model with Anchored Epipolar Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24761)
*Po-Chien Luan,Zimin Xia,Wuyang Li,Yang Gao,Alexandre Alahi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Drift-Resistant Navigation World Model，通过锚点引导的滚动生成方式，同时缓解感知漂移和几何漂移，提升长程视觉质量、几何一致性和多视图连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有导航世界模型在递归滚动生成中存在两大问题：一是噪声累积导致感知漂移，二是预测偏离真实运动轨迹导致几何漂移，限制了模型在长期导航中的可靠性。

Method: 将传统逐帧滚动重新设计为锚点引导的滚动：先预测稀疏的未来锚点作为稳定的长程目标，再基于过去上下文和未来锚点条件生成块内的中间帧；同时利用双向对极几何约束锚点与中间帧之间的几何一致性。

Result: 在四个基准数据集上，该方法在长程视觉质量、几何一致性和多视图连贯性上均优于强基线，并进一步提升了下游规划任务的性能。

Conclusion: 抗漂移、几何感知的预测对构建可靠的导航世界模型至关重要。

Abstract: We propose Drift-Resistant Navigation World Model, a generative model that mitigates both perceptual drift and geometric drift in conventional rollout-based navigation world models. Existing methods recursively feed generated content into subsequent steps, causing noise accumulation and degraded predictions, i.e., perceptual drift. Meanwhile, their predictions often deviate from the agent's motion, resulting in geometry drift. We address both types of drift by redesigning world-model prediction as an anchor-guided rollout. Instead of rolling out every frame sequentially, we first predict sparse future anchors that serve as stable long-range targets, and then generate intermediate frames within each chunk conditioned on both past context and future anchors. Importantly, these sparse anchors also provide geometric constraints, supported by bidirectional epipolar geometry, to localize where corresponding content should appear in the intermediate frames. Experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines in long-horizon visual quality, geometric consistency, and multi-view coherence. These gains further translate into improved downstream planning performance under the same planners, highlighting the importance of drift-resistant, geometry-aware prediction for reliable navigation world models.

</details>


### [90] [4KLSDB: A Large-Scale Dataset for 4K Image Restoration and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24762)
*Zihao Zhu,Kuan-Ru Huang,Zhaoming Xu,Renjie Li,Bo Wu,Ruizheng Bai,Mingyang Wu,Sayak Paul,Zhengzhong Tu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个包含129,484张4K分辨率的超大规模数据集4KLSDB，涵盖自然、城市、人物等多个类别，通过多阶段自动化过滤和人工+LMM标注确保质量，实验证明在该数据集上训练的SR和T2I模型性能显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏原生4K分辨率且规模不足，无法满足训练最先进的超分辨率和文生图扩散模型的需求。

Method: 从Photo Concept Bucket、Laion2B、PD12M等开放数据集收集图像，经过多阶段自动化过滤和人工+大多模态模型（LMM）标注，构建了包含129,484张4K图像的训练集及独立的验证集（2,000张）和测试集（1,984张）。

Result: 在4KLSDB上训练的超分辨率和扩散模型在原生4K基准测试上取得显著性能提升，实验表明训练使用真实4K分辨率数据与图像恢复任务保真度之间存在正相关关系。

Conclusion: 4KLSDB为社区提供了推动高保真图像合成与恢复研究的重要资源，证明了大规模真实4K数据对模型性能的有益影响。

Abstract: High-resolution datasets are essential for advancing super-resolution (SR) and text-to-image (T2I) diffusion research. However, current publicly available datasets lack both the native 4K resolution and the extensive scale necessary for training state-of-the-art models. To address this gap, we introduce a 4K Large Scale Dataset and Benchmark (4KLSDB), a large-scale, diverse dataset consisting of 129,484 carefully curated 4K resolution images spanning multiple categories such as nature, urban scenes, people, food, artwork, and CGI, alongside distinct validation and test sets containing 2,000 and 1,984 images respectively. Images were sourced from established open datasets including Photo Concept Bucket, Laion2B, and PD12M. 4KLSDB underwent rigorous multi-stage automated filtering and annotation pipelines involving both human annotators and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) to ensure high aesthetic quality and dataset consistency. We demonstrate 4KLSDB's effectiveness by training representative super-resolution and diffusion models, observing significant improvements in performance on native 4K benchmarks. Comprehensive experiments illustrate a positive correlation between training on true 4K resolution data and improved fidelity in image restoration task, especially on 4K resolution. We provide the research community a valuable resource to drive progress toward genuinely high-fidelity image synthesis and restoration by providing 4KLSDB. Our project page is available at: https://4klsdb.github.io/.

</details>


### [91] [Leveraging pretrained RGB denoisers for hyperspectral image restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24769)
*Daniele Picone,Mohamad Jouni,Mauro Dalla-Mura*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种轻量级适配器，通过投影映射复用预训练的RGB去噪器进行高光谱图像恢复，在去噪、去模糊、超分辨率任务上超越高光谱专用基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高光谱图像恢复面临训练数据有限、传感器特异性强、光谱维度高等挑战，难以学习鲁棒的高光谱先验，因此希望复用从大规模RGB数据中学到的先验知识。

Method: 提出一种仅需少量训练的轻量级适配器，通过投影映射将高光谱数据映射到低维光谱投影，利用冻结的预训练RGB去噪器进行处理，再通过约束线性聚合重建高光谱立方体，保持即插即用兼容性和稳定性。

Result: 在去噪、去模糊和超分辨率任务上，多个数据集均一致超越高光谱专用基线方法，证明大规模RGB先验的强迁移能力。

Conclusion: 大规模RGB先验可有效迁移至高光谱图像恢复任务，所提方法以极低训练成本取得优异性能。

Abstract: Hyperspectral image restoration faces several challenges, including limited training data, strong sensor specificity, and high spectral dimensionality. These limitations hinder the learning of robust hyperspectral priors, motivating the reuse of priors learned from large-scale RGB data. In this work, we propose a minimally trained, lightweight adapter that repurposes frozen pretrained RGB denoisers for hyperspectral restoration through a projection mapping. The method denoises low-dimensional spectral projections and reconstructs the hyperspectral cube through constrained linear aggregation, while preserving plug-and-play compatibility and the stability properties of the underlying RGB denoiser. Experiments on denoising, deblurring, and super-resolution across multiple datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over hyperspectral-specific baselines, showing the strong transferability of large-scale RGB priors.

</details>


### [92] [From Theory to Decision Rule: Calibrating the Noisy-Label Crossover for Vision-Language Model Weak Supervision Across Three Medical-Imaging Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24771)
*Bruce Changlong Xu,Jose James,Alexander Ryu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文对经典弱监督学习理论中的"交叉点"预测进行了实证校准，使用BiomedCLIP生成的弱标签在三个医学影像基准上验证了理论边界的存在，并提出了一个仅需10-20个金标签即可操作的决策规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典噪声标签理论预测弱监督性能受限于标注者准确率，存在一个"交叉点"——一旦金训练的分类器达到标注者水平，弱标签反而有害。但该预测缺乏面向现代基础模型标注器的实例级校准。

Method: 使用BiomedCLIP在三个医学影像基准（PCAM、ISIC、NIH-CXR）上生成弱标签，跨六种下游架构（参数范围11倍），测量交叉点位置、弱标签退化程度，并提出基于10-20个金标签的决策规则。

Result: 交叉点出现在PCAM约100、ISIC约20-50、NIH-CXR约250-500个金标签处；交叉点以上弱标签使AUC下降最多-0.10；交叉点位置对四种预训练架构不变；NIH-CXR上发现结构化vs随机噪声符号翻转，表明仅基于速率的理论边界不完整。

Conclusion: 理论预测的交叉点在真实场景中确实存在且可量化；标签者（而非学生模型）是主导约束；需要标签空间投影等细化来完善理论；提出了可直接操作的金标签数量决策规则。

Abstract: Classical noisy-label theory predicts that downstream performance under weak supervision is bounded above by the labeler's accuracy, implying a sharp crossover: once a gold-trained classifier matches the labeler, weak labels stop helping and start hurting. The prediction is theoretical; what is missing is a benchmark calibration that turns it into an instance-level statement for modern foundation-model labelers. We provide such a calibration for BiomedCLIP-generated weak labels on three medical-imaging benchmarks (PCAM, ISIC, NIH-CXR) and six downstream architectures spanning an 11x parameter range. The crossover predicted by theory appears at ng~100 on PCAM, 20-50 on ISIC, and 250-500 on NIH-CXR; weak labels above the crossover degrade AUC by up to -0.10. The location is architecture-invariant for four of five pretrained architectures, and a within-family DenseNet sweep (2.5x parameters, identical pretraining) supports the view that the labeler, not the student, is the dominant constraint. The calibration in turn produces a decision rule operable from 10-20 gold labels: compare gold-only AUC to VLM accuracy on the user's gold set. A structured-vs-random noise sign flip on NIH-CXR shows that the rate-only formulation of the bound is incomplete and identifies a concrete refinement (label-space projection) that future benchmarks can be designed to test.

</details>


### [93] [How Noisy Poses Break Inverse Dynamics: Analysis and Mitigation for Video-Based Joint Torque Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24776)
*Donghyun Kim,Chanyoung Kim,Eunseo Jeong,Youngjoong Kwon,Seong Jae Hwang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了单目3D人体姿态估计噪声通过逆动力学计算关节力矩时的传播与放大问题，发现噪声被放大约1000倍，近端关节比远端关节敏感10倍，低通滤波可有效抑制放大。作者开发了SMPL-Dynamics可微逆动力学模块，并利用可微姿态优化将力矩误差降低93%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将单目3D人体姿态估计的 kinematic 结果转换为物理量（如关节力矩）时，逆动力学过程中的噪声放大问题严重阻碍了实际应用，本文旨在系统量化这一噪声传播机制并寻找解决方案。

Method: 开发了SMPL-Dynamics，一种全可微的逆动力学模块，无需外部物理仿真器，支持端到端梯度计算；通过数值微分与低通滤波分析噪声传播特性，并利用可微姿态精炼（differentiable pose refinement）来优化力矩估计。

Result: (1) 姿态噪声在计算关节力矩时被放大约1000倍；(2) 近端关节（脊柱、髋部）对噪声的敏感度是远端关节（手腕、手部）的10倍；(3) 低通滤波可显著降低噪声放大；利用可微姿态精炼实现了93%的力矩误差降低，同时姿态变化极小。

Conclusion: 逆动力学中噪声放大的严重性被首次系统量化，SMPL-Dynamics提供了一种高效的解决路径，可微姿态精炼在不显著改变姿态的前提下大幅提升了力矩估计精度，为从视频中可靠估计人体物理量奠定了基础。

Abstract: Recent advances in monocular 3D human pose estimation enable accurate body tracking from video. However, translating these kinematic estimates into physical quantities, such as joint torques, remains challenging due to noise amplification through inverse dynamics. In this work, we provide a systematic analysis of how pose estimation noise propagates through the inverse dynamics pipeline. We present three key findings: (1) pose noise is amplified by approximately 1,000x when computing joint torques via numerical differentiation, (2) proximal joints (spine, hips) are up to 10x more sensitive to noise than distal joints (wrists, hands), and (3) low-pass filtering before differentiation substantially reduces this amplification. To enable this analysis, we develop SMPL-Dynamics, a fully differentiable inverse dynamics module for the SMPL body model that requires no external physics simulators. Our module supports end-to-end gradient computation, and we demonstrate this through differentiable pose refinement, which reduces torque error by 93% with negligible change in pose.

</details>


### [94] [Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Cardiac MR Sequence Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24789)
*Yuli Wang,Hyewon Jung,Dongshen Peng,Yuwei Dai,Jing Wu,Haoyue Guan,Yoko Kato,Zhicheng Jiao,Yu Sun,Ihab Kamel,Joao Lima,Cheng Ting Lin,Harrison Bai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究ViT模型在心脏磁共振图像上的适配问题，提出基于自监督对比学习的适配策略，使模型在心脏MR分类中AUC超过0.75，并能泛化到外部MR数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用数据集预训练的ViT模型缺乏医学影像领域知识，在心脏MR图像上特征迁移效果差，需要领域适配策略。

Method: 采用基于图像的自监督对比学习对ViT模型进行领域适配，在内部心脏MR数据集上训练。

Result: 适配后的ViT模型在四种心脏MR序列分类上AUC超0.75，优于传统监督训练方法，且能泛化到BraTS和ADNI等外部MR数据集。

Conclusion: 自监督对比学习是一种有效的ViT医学影像适配策略，能够弥补通用预训练缺乏领域知识的不足，并具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) models, utilizing self-attention mechanisms, have demonstrated robust generalization capabilities across various vision tasks, including image classification. However, these models, typically pretrained on general public datasets, often lack the specialized domain knowledge necessary for medical imaging applications. In this study, we investigate the adaptation of ViT models, specifically for cardiac magnetic resonance (MR) images, using an in-house dataset. We found that pretrained ViT features do not effectively transfer to the cardiac MR domain. To overcome this limitation, we introduce an adaptation strategy that utilizes image-based self-supervised contrastive learning, demonstrating superior performance compared to traditional supervised training approaches. Moreover, our adapted ViT model exhibits strong generalization to external MR datasets such as BraTS and ADNI. Through ablation studies, we further investigate the impact of batch size and dataset scale on performance. Ultimately, our adapted model achieves classification AUC exceeding 0.75 across the four most common cardiac MR sequences.

</details>


### [95] [Parameter-Efficient VLMs for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy: Medical Image Generation and Clinical Visual Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24792)
*Ojonugwa Oluwafemi Ejiga Peter,Frederick Akor Ejiga,Fahmi Khalifa,Md Mahmudur Rahman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种双管道PEFT模型，结合Florence-2进行医学视觉问答（VQA）和使用LoRA的Stable Diffusion 2.1生成合成GI内镜图像，在Kvasir-VQA数据集上取得了优异性能，ROUGE-1达0.92，计算成本降低约90%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GI内镜AI系统受限于标注数据不足、隐私政策严格和传统微调瓶颈，阻碍了AI在临床中的可靠部署与可扩展性。

Method: 采用双管道PEFT框架：1）基于Florence-2视觉语言模型进行VQA，通过PEFT增强可解释性并降低计算成本；2）利用LoRA与Stable Diffusion 2.1生成高质量合成GI图像，在不侵犯隐私的前提下扩充训练数据。

Result: Florence-2 VQA模型ROUGE-1达0.92，ROUGE-L达0.91，BLEU从0.08提升至0.24。rank-4 LoRA合成 fidelity 0.290，agreement 0.730，FBD 1450，计算成本降低近90%。

Conclusion: 该框架有效提升了GI内镜AI的临床潜力，在VQA和合成数据生成方面均表现优越，优于FLUX、MSDM、Kandinsky 2.2等模型，为临床AI提供了鲁棒性解决方案。

Abstract: The major limitations of gastrointestinal (GI) endoscopy AI systems arise from a shortage of annotated data, strict privacy policies, and significant bottlenecks in conventional model fine-tuning. Such limitations impede the successful application of sophisticated AI models in clinical practice, particularly affecting the reliability and scalability of diagnosis. In this paper, we present a dual-pipeline PEFT model that addresses two fundamental problems: medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) and the generation of privacy-preserving synthetic data. For clinical VQA, we adopt the Florence-2 vision-language model. Leveraging PEFT enhances model interpretability while substantially reducing the computational cost of training. Simultaneously, we employ Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) with Stable Diffusion 2.1 to generate high-quality GI images that enhance training databases without violating patient privacy. This research utilized the Kvasir-VQA dataset. Our Florence-2 VQA model achieved ROUGE-1 of 0.92, ROUGE-L of 0.91, and BLEU score improvements from 0.08 to 0.24. Fine-tuning on private datasets consistently showed better results than fine-tuning on public datasets. The rank-4 LoRA synthesis achieved optimal performance with a fidelity score of 0.290, an agreement score of 0.730, and a Frechet BiomedCLIP Distance (FBD) of 1450, reducing computational costs by almost 90 percent. This framework improves the clinical potential of AI in GI endoscopy. Compared to FLUX, MSDM, and Kandinsky 2.2, our model demonstrates superior FBD and strong semantic alignment. While other models lead in Fidelity or Agreement, our lower FBD indicates better image-text coherence. These results establish our approach as a robust solution for enhancing VQA and synthetic data generation in clinical AI.

</details>


### [96] [DUEL: Adversarial Self-Play for Multimodal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24794)
*Lin Qiu,Hanqing Zeng,Yao Liu,Bingjun Sun,Guangdeng Liao,Ji Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出无需人工标注的自我进化后训练框架DUEL，通过两个策略网络的对抗互动和长度归一化对数似然奖励，提升视觉语言模型的推理能力和鲁棒判别力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习优化VLM的方法依赖昂贵的高质量标注，难以扩展；无监督替代方法因视觉基础薄弱和缺乏可靠验证信号而可能产生偏差。

Method: 提出DUEL框架：(1) Challenger生成基于图像的真实声明和最小扰动的硬负样本；(2) Solver验证两组声明，促进细粒度视觉判别；(3) 引入长度归一化对数似然奖励，在稀疏反馈下保持优化信号。

Result: 无需额外人工标注、外部奖励模型或图像编辑工具，持续提升视觉推理能力和鲁棒判别能力。

Conclusion: 通过对抗性策略互动和自我验证机制，实现了VLM后训练阶段的无监督自我进化，有效解决了标注稀缺和偏差漂移问题。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capability of vision-language models (VLMs). However, RL-based optimization typically depends on costly high-quality annotations that are difficult to scale. Existing unsupervised alternatives may drift toward biased solutions due to weak visual grounding and the lack of reliable verification signals. We propose a self-evolving post-training framework, DUEL, where supervision emerges from adversarial interactions between two policies initialized from the same pretrained VLM. A Challenger generates an image-grounded true claim together with a minimally perturbed hard-negative counterpart, while a Solver verifies both claims against the image, encouraging fine-grained visual discrimination under near-neighbor semantics. To stabilize optimization, we introduce a length-normalized log-likelihood reward that preserves informative optimization signals beyond binary outcome supervision and improves learning stability under sparse feedback. Experiments show that DUEL consistently improves visual reasoning and robust discrimination without additional human annotations, external reward models, or image editing tools.

</details>


### [97] [HCL-FF: Hierarchical and Contrastive Learning for Forward-Forward Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24797)
*Jie-En Yao,Hong-En Chen,C. -C. Jay Kuo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出HCL-FF框架，在Forward-Forward算法基础上引入层级化粗到细学习策略和监督对比学习目标，显著提升了图像分类性能，在多个数据集上达到FF方法中的SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的反向传播网络虽性能优异但存在生物不可解释、计算代价高、难理解等问题。FF算法虽提供了局部学习替代方案，但缺乏跨层协调，且goodness与特征解耦导致表征无约束、语义模糊。

Method: 提出HCL-FF框架，包含：(1) 粗到细的分层学习策略，引导表征从低级特征向高级语义过渡；(2) 监督对比学习目标，在goodness解耦后强制类别判别性对齐。

Result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上分别实现+5.46%、+17.00%和+12.51%的精度提升，达到FF方法中SOTA。

Conclusion: HCL-FF通过层次化协调和对比学习有效解决了FF算法的局限性，证明了在无需反向传播的条件下也能实现高性能视觉表征学习。

Abstract: Deep neural networks trained with backpropagation have achieved outstanding performance in vision tasks but remain biologically implausible, computationally demanding, and difficult to interpret. The Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm offers a promising alternative by training each layer independently through local goodness objectives. However, its purely local optimization lacks hierarchical coordination across layers, and the decoupling of goodness from features leaves the representations unconstrained and semantically ambiguous. We propose a Hierarchical and Contrastive Learning FF framework (HCL-FF) to address these limitations. HCL-FF introduces (1) a coarse-to-fine hierarchical learning strategy that guides representations from low-level cues to high-level semantics, and (2) a supervised contrastive objective that enforces class-discriminative alignment after goodness decoupling. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet demonstrate that HCL-FF achieves new state-of-the-art performance among FF-based methods, with notable accuracy gains of +5.46%, +17.00%, and +12.51%, respectively.

</details>


### [98] [Divide-and-Conquer Inference for Large-Scale Visual Recognition with Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24799)
*Zhipeng Ye,Jiaqi Huang,Feng Jiang,Qiufeng Wang,Yikang Duan,Dawei Wang,Xihang Zhou,Qian Qiao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Divide-and-Conquer Inference (DCI)的测试时缩放策略，用于解决多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在大规模图像分类中因标签空间扩大而导致的性能崩溃问题。DCI通过递归分解全局分类任务为局部子问题，并采用动态剪枝机制压缩搜索空间，有效提升了信噪比和分类精度，同时加速了推理过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在长序列识别中会出现性能崩溃现象，根本原因是信息熵增加与注意力机制中的注意力稀释/衰减之间存在冲突，导致信噪比不足。

Method: 提出Divide-and-Conquer Inference (DCI)策略：递归地将复杂全局分类任务分解为多个简单局部子问题，并引入动态剪枝机制压缩搜索空间，以改善局部信噪比、缓解注意力权重稀释问题。

Result: 在ImageNet-1K和ImageNet-21K等基准上，DCI持续提升分类准确率，使轻量级开源模型无需额外训练即可匹敌甚至超越前沿闭源模型，并且推理速度更快。

Conclusion: DCI是一种与模型无关、即插即用的高效范式，能够在不进行额外训练的情况下，显著提升MLLMs在大规模视觉识别场景中的推理精度和效率。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across a wide range of vision language tasks. However, when applied to large scale image classification, their performance degrades significantly as the label space expands a phenomenon we define as Performance Collapse in Long Sequence Recognition. Through an information theoretic analysis, we reveal that this collapse stems from a fundamental conflict between the escalating information entropy and the prominent attention dilution and decay within attention mechanisms, which impairs the model's ability to maintain a sufficient signal-to-noise ratio when processing extremely long prompts. To mitigate this, we propose Divide-and-Conquer Inference (DCI), a novel test-time scaling strategy for visual recognition with MLLMs. DCI recursively decomposes complex global classification tasks into multiple simpler, localized subproblems and employs a dynamic pruning mechanism to compress the search space. This method effectively improves the local signal to noise ratio and model accuracy by mitigating the inherent weight dilution issues in long-sequence inference. Moreover, while traditional self-attention incurs a prohibitive quadratic computational complexity, DCI achieves more favorable scaling behavior and substantially accelerates inference in large scale classification scenarios. Extensive experiments on benchmarks such as ImageNet-1K and ImageNet-21K demonstrate that DCI consistently improves classification accuracy. This enables lightweight open-source models to rival or even surpass frontier closed-source giants without any additional training or fine-tuning. As a model-agnostic, plug-and-play paradigm, DCI offers an efficient approach for scaling the inferential precision of MLLMs in large-scale scenarios.

</details>


### [99] [Fishbone: From One 3D Asset to a Million Controllable Edits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24805)
*Yumeng He,Xiaoying Wang,Peihao Li,Yanjia Huang,Joe Masterjohn,Jiajun Wu,Leonidas Guibas,Yin Yang,Ying Jiang,Chenfanfu Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Fishbone提出了一种统一的"肋-脊柱"表示方法，用于通用3D网格的可控参数化变形、降维动力学和动画，通过自适应热方法计算测地标量场、提取等值线作为横截面肋、构建平滑几何感知脊柱，并利用高斯加权蒙皮关联表面顶点，实现了实时、可预测的变形控制，同时构建了Fishbone-136K数据集并展示了在可控3D生成、数据增强、交互编辑等多个应用场景中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模可控3D资产生成对于计算机图形学、具身AI、机器人等领域至关重要，但人工建模和绑定的高昂成本使得创建多样化3D资产极具挑战性。现有的数据驱动方法依赖稀疏用户输入，参数化编辑框架则需要手动设计的控制结构和类别特定的配置，缺乏统一且通用的解决方案。

Method: 受自然生物脊柱和肋骨结构的启发，Fishbone提出了一种统一的肋-脊柱表示方法：首先通过自适应热方法计算测地标量场，提取等值线作为横截面肋，构建几何感知脊柱，再使用高斯加权蒙皮将表面顶点与肋和脊柱结构关联。该表示支持肋控制局部轮廓（厚度、方向、横截面变化），脊柱控制全局变形（弯曲、扭曲、拉伸），同时支持降维仿真和关键帧动画。

Result: 构建了Fishbone-136K数据集（基于Hunyuan3D增强），在可控3D生成、基于变形的机器人学习数据增强、交互式网格编辑和自主生成等应用中展示了效果、效率和通用性。

Conclusion: 实验证明了Fishbone框架在3D网格变形控制方面的有效性、高效性和多功能性，为通用形状的可控参数化变形提供了统一且实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Large-scale controllable 3D assets are critical for computer graphics, embodied AI, robotics, and interactive content creation, yet creating diverse 3D assets remains challenging due to the high cost of manual modeling and rigging. Shape deformation offers a natural way to generate variations from existing meshes, but existing data-driven methods often rely on sparse user inputs, while parametric editing frameworks require manually designed control structures and category-specific configurations. Inspired by natural creatures, where a central spine governs global shape and cross-sectional ribs control local variation, we introduce Fishbone, a unified rib-spine representation for general shapes that supports controllable parametric mesh deformation, reduced-space dynamics, and animation. Given an input mesh, Fishbone computes a geodesic scalar field with an adaptive heat method, extracts iso-contours as cross-sectional ribs, constructs a smooth geometry-aware spine through rib centers, and associates surface vertices with nearby rib and spine structures using Gaussian-weighted skinning. The resulting representation enables real-time and predictable deformation: ribs control local profiles such as thickness, orientation, and cross-sectional variation, while the spine controls global bending, twisting, and stretching. The same structure also supports reduced-space simulation and keyframe animation. We further construct Fishbone-136K by augmenting Hunyuan3D with rib-spine structures, and demonstrate applications in controllable 3D generation, deformation-based data augmentation for robot learning, interactive mesh editing, and agentic generation. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, and versatility of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [100] [CLIP-Guided SAM: Parameter-Efficient Semantic Conditioning for Promptable Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24807)
*Shayan Jalilian,Abdul Bais*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CLIP-Guided SAM，通过轻量级多模态语义适配器将CLIP-derived特征直接注入SAM图像编码器，实现内部语义条件化，在低标注数据场景下达到高效分割，支持手动和半自动两种模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAM虽然生成高质量掩码，但缺乏语义理解，依赖外部提示指定类别；现有视觉-语言方法通过外部提示耦合（先由VLM生成空间提示再输入SAM）来解决，但效率低下且语义信息仅在预处理阶段使用。

Method: 提出内部语义条件化框架，设计轻量级多模态语义适配器，将CLIP的文本、视觉和相似性特征直接注入SAM图像编码器，调节其内部特征表示，同时保留SAM原有的可提示接口。支持手动模式（文本+空间提示）和半自动文本-only模式。

Result: 在通用基准和专用下游任务上，与SAM+PEFT基线、视觉-语言+SAM流水线、SAM 3以及强半监督方法相比，CLIP-Guided SAM在参数高效的前提下实现了一致更优或竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 训练-测试提示一致性是重要设计原则；该方法在低标注数据场景下高效且实用，参数效率高。

Abstract: Promptable foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) produce high-quality masks but remain semantically blind, relying on external prompts to specify categories. Existing vision-language approaches address this limitation by using external prompt coupling, where a vision-language model generates spatial prompts for SAM as a separate stage.
  We propose CLIP-Guided SAM, a parameter-efficient segmentation framework built on internal semantic conditioning. Instead of using semantic signals only to generate prompts, we inject CLIP-derived text, vision, and similarity features directly into SAM's image encoder through lightweight multi-modal semantic adapters. These adapters condition SAM's internal feature representations, allowing semantic information to influence mask prediction while preserving SAM's original promptable interface.
  Our framework is designed for low labeled-data settings and applies to both general-domain benchmarks and specialized downstream tasks. It supports two operating modes: Manual mode, for interactive segmentation with both text and spatial prompts, and Semi-Automatic text-only mode, for applications that require concept-specific segmentation using only textual input. We show that robustness depends on aligning training with the type of prompts used at inference, making train-test prompt consistency an important design principle.
  Through extensive experiments and ablations, we evaluate our method against SAM+PEFT baselines without semantic conditioning, vision-language + SAM pipelines, SAM 3, and strong semi-supervised segmentation methods that rely on large amounts of unlabeled data. Across these settings, CLIP-Guided SAM consistently achieves superior or competitive performance while remaining parameter-efficient in both training and deployment.

</details>


### [101] [AOEPT: Breaking the Implicit Modality-Reduction Bottleneck in Modality-Missing Prompt Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24816)
*Jian Lang,Rongpei Hong,Ting Zhong,Fan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出AOEPT方法，通过模态上下文提示（MCPs）蒸馏全局模态先验，解决多模态Transformer在模态缺失场景下推理受限的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有提示调优方法在处理模态缺失时存在"隐式模态缩减瓶颈"——仅基于可用模态构建提示，限制了模型对缺失模态潜在信息源的访问。

Method: 提出AOEPT，核心是模态上下文提示（MCPs）：从训练数据中蒸馏全局模态级先验作为缺失模态的信息仓库，再根据剩余模态实例化为实例感知提示，选择性增强缺失模态信息。

Result: 在多种多模态基准和骨干网络上验证了AOEPT的强性能，且计算开销极小。

Conclusion: AOEPT通过恢复模型超越仅观测模态子空间的推理范围，有效克服了隐式模态缩减瓶颈，是一种轻量高效的模态缺失场景解决方案。

Abstract: Deploying multimodal systems in real-world environments often entails handling modality-missing scenarios, where one or more modalities are unavailable. While recent studies address this challenge for the general Multimodal Transformer (MT) architecture via prompt tuning, we identify a fundamental limitation in these methods: the Implicit Modality-Reduction bottleneck. By conditioning prompts solely on the observed modalities, they inadvertently restrict the reasoning scope of MTs to the modality-reduced subspace, cutting off access to the latent information sources of the missing modalities. To overcome this limitation, we propose AOEPT, which pioneers a novel modal-contextualized prompting fashion. Specifically, we introduce lightweight Modal-Contextualized Prompts (MCPs) that distill global modality-wise priors from training data, serving as latent repositories of the information sources for missing modalities. Conditioned on the remaining modalities, these MCPs are instantiated into instance-aware prompts that selectively augment missing-modality information for each sample, thereby restoring the reasoning scope of MTs beyond the observed-modality-only subspace. Experiments across various multimodal benchmarks and backbones confirm the strong performance of AOEPT, with minimal computational overhead.

</details>


### [102] [Multiscale Real-Time Object Detection in the NMS-Free Era: A Comparative Performance Evaluation of YOLOv8 and YOLO26](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24831)
*Chidera G. Oguine,Kanyifeechukwu J. Oguine,Obiozor M. Oguine,Ozioma C. Oguine*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了NMS-based模型YOLOv8与NMS-free模型YOLO26在通用目标检测（Pascal VOC）和密集小目标检测（VisDrone）上的性能。结果表明，YOLO26在Pascal VOC上表现更优且模型复杂度更低，但在VisDrone上两者差距缩小；YOLOv8在GPU延迟上仍有优势，说明NMS-free设计并非普遍优于传统方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NMS后处理步骤在实时目标检测中引入延迟波动和部署复杂性，而新兴的NMS-free设计（如YOLO26）虽旨在减少这一依赖，但其与NMS-based模型（如YOLOv8）在非标准基准上的性能对比尚缺乏系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，为实际部署中的模型选择提供参考。

Method: 选取YOLOv8（NMS-based）和YOLO26（NMS-free）两大类模型，在Pascal VOC（通用目标检测）和VisDrone（密集空中小目标检测）两个数据集上，对每个模型家族的五个尺度进行系统评估。评价指标涵盖检测精度、定位精度、模型大小、GFLOPs以及CPU/GPU延迟。

Result: 1）YOLO26在Pascal VOC上大多数尺度下取得更强的检测性能和更低的模型复杂度；2）在VisDrone密集小目标场景下，两者性能差距缩小，均表现不佳；3）YOLOv8在GPU延迟上保持竞争力，表明NMS-free设计并非在所有部署场景中占据优势。

Conclusion: 目标检测器的选择需综合考虑数据集特性、目标尺度分布、模型容量及硬件约束，NMS-free设计并非银弹，应针对具体应用场景进行权衡。

Abstract: Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) remains a key post-processing step in many real-time object detection pipelines, but it can introduce latency variation and deployment complexity in resource-constrained settings. Recent NMS-free designs such as YOLO26 aim to reduce this dependence through end-to-end detection, yet their performance relative to established NMS-based models such as YOLOv8 remains underexplored beyond standard benchmarks. This paper compares YOLOv8 and YOLO26 on Pascal VOC and VisDrone, representing general object detection and dense aerial small-object detection, respectively. Both model families are evaluated across five scales using accuracy, localization, model size, GFLOPs, and CPU/GPU latency. Results show that YOLO26 achieves stronger detection performance and lower model complexity on Pascal VOC across most scales, while the performance gap narrows on VisDrone, where both models struggle with dense small targets. YOLOv8 remains competitive in GPU latency, showing that NMS-free design does not guarantee universal deployment superiority. Overall, the study shows that detector selection depends on dataset characteristics, object scale, model capacity, and hardware constraints.

</details>


### [103] [Adversarial Error Correction for Visual Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24843)
*Ligong Bi,Tao Huang,Jianyuan Guo,Chang Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出AID-VAR，一种即插即用框架，通过对抗性注入诊断机制（类似GAN的判别器反馈）来纠正VAR模型在层级化图像生成中的级联误差传播，在不改变预训练模型结构的前提下显著提升生成质量（如FID提升16%，参数量仅增加3%），并提出了跨尺度一致性评分（ISCS）作为新评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VAR模型在层级化下一尺度预测中存在级联误差传播问题——细粒度的粗尺度预测错误会随着层级放大，最终导致生成图像失真。现有方法缺乏有效的错误纠正机制。

Method: 提出AID-VAR框架：1）在每个尺度转换处部署诊断判别器来识别保真度差距；2）设计轻量级引导注入器作为非侵入式适配器，在冻结的VAR骨干网络基础上优化特征流形；3）引入跨尺度一致性评分（ISCS）作为新评估指标，量化连续分辨率尺度间的保真度和结构对齐。

Result: AID-VAR-d20在FID上提升16%，参数量仅增加3%。实验表明该方法能生成更锐利的纹理细节、更少的结构失真，且不改变训练数据、基础架构或采样策略，计算开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: AID-VAR是一种高效且可扩展的升级路径，无需重训练即可提升大规模VAR生成器的全局一致性和局部细节质量，代码已开源。

Abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for image synthesis by performing hierarchical next-scale prediction. However, VAR models are inherently prone to cascading error propagation, where subtle coarse-scale mispredictions are amplified across the hierarchy, ultimately distorting the final synthesis. To mitigate this, we propose AID-VAR, a plug-and-play framework that enhances pre-trained VARs through Adversarially Injected Diagnosis. Instead of a standard passive generation, AID-VAR introduces a proactive error-correction mechanism inspired by the adversarial feedback in GANs. We deploy a discriminator to diagnose fidelity gaps at each scale transition, coupled with a lightweight guidance injector. This module operates as a non-invasive adapter that refines the feature manifold of a frozen VAR backbone, effectively steering the generation toward the distribution of real images without destabilizing the pre-trained latent space. Furthermore, to rigorously evaluate this cross-scale progression, we introduce the Inter-Scale Consistency Score (ISCS), a novel metric that quantifies the fidelity and structural alignment between consecutive resolution scales. Experimental results across various backbones demonstrate that AID-VAR delivers sharper textural details and fewer structural distortions with negligible overhead. For instance, AID-VAR-d20 achieves a 16% improvement in FID with only a 3% increase in parameters. These results establish AID-VAR as a highly efficient and scalable pathway for upgrading large-scale VAR generators, enhancing global coherence and local detail without altering training data, base architectures, or sampling schedules. Code is available at https://github.com/bijiw515/AID-VAR.

</details>


### [104] [Trajectory-Consistent Calibration for Cache-Accelerated Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24870)
*Mingyu Liang,Dingkun Xu,Jingwei Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出轨迹一致校准（TCC），一种无需训练的方法，通过离线迭代校准缓存表示以补偿其与完整计算之间的偏差，从而提升扩散Transformer的缓存加速质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散Transformer推理中迭代采样计算量大，缓存加速虽能减少计算但会引入表示偏差，降低生成质量。现有方法未充分考虑校准中直接偏差与后续轨迹偏移的耦合问题。

Method: 提出TCC，采用离线迭代校准流程：每次校准不仅修正当前缓存的表示偏差，还考虑此前校准对后续轨迹的偏移影响，从而逐次累积更准确的校准先验。

Result: 在PixArt-alpha和DiT-XL/2上，TCC一致提升了多种缓存加速方法的FID指标。例如在FORA加速的PixArt-alpha上，FID从29.83降至27.35，略超完整计算基线。

Conclusion: TCC能有效补偿缓存加速中的表示偏差，无需额外训练即可提升生成质量，甚至在某些设置下超越完整计算基线。

Abstract: Diffusion Transformers require repeated denoiser evaluations during iterative sampling, making inference computationally expensive. Cache-based acceleration reduces this cost by reusing intermediate representations across denoising steps, but can introduce representation deviations and degrade generation quality. In this paper, we analyze these deviations and show that effective calibration should consider both the direct mismatch caused by reuse and the subsequent trajectory shift induced by earlier corrections. To address this challenge, we propose Trajectory-Consistent Calibration (TCC), a training-free method that calibrates cached representations toward their full-computation counterparts. Specifically, rather than estimating all calibration priors from a single uncorrected cache trajectory, TCC uses an offline iterative procedure so that each prior accounts for the trajectory shift induced by preceding calibrations. Experiments on PixArt-alpha and DiT-XL/2 show that TCC consistently improves FID across representative cache-based acceleration methods while preserving their underlying reuse policies. Notably, in a representative PixArt-alpha cache-acceleration setting based on FORA, TCC reduces FID from 29.83 to 27.35, slightly surpassing the full-computation baseline.

</details>


### [105] [QuoVLA: Quotient Space for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24890)
*Xuan Wang,Yinan Wu,Haoran Duan,Jungong Han*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Quotient Theory for VLA，认为预训练VLM潜变量已包含足够动作信息但存在冗余，通过商空间框架QuoVLA（量化模块+双分支设计+相对时序复杂度正则化）压缩出动作充分表示，在多个基准上取得优异泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战现有VLA方法中"动作不充分"的主流观点，证明预训练VLM潜变量并非缺乏动作信息，而是信息充足但存在与最优动作无关的prompt级冗余。

Method: 提出QuoVLA框架，基于商空间理论压缩VLM潜变量：包含量化模块实现离散化、双分支设计分离动作相关与无关信息、相对时序复杂度正则化去除prompt级冗余。

Result: 在多个基准测试上取得强性能，尤其在视觉、语言和环境分布偏移下的泛化能力提升显著。

Conclusion: 挑战了VLA领域"动作不充分"的固有认知，证实VLM潜变量动作信息充足但需去冗余，QuoVLA框架有效实现了这一理论。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models commonly adapt pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to robot control by mapping visual observations and language instructions to continuous actions. Existing approaches typically take an action-insufficiency view, assuming that pretrained VLM latents either lack directly usable action information or should be shielded from action-learning signals. Against this view, our \textit{Quotient Theory for VLA} shows that pretrained VLM latents are not action-insufficient but action-sufficient: they already contain the information needed for control, yet remain overcomplete by distinguishing prompt-level variations that induce the same optimal action behavior. To operationalize this theory, we propose QuoVLA, a quotient-space framework for VLA that compresses pretrained VLM latents into action-sufficient representations. Specifically, QuoVLA instantiates this principle with a quantization module and a dual-branch design with relative temporal-complexity regularization, preserving action-relevant information while removing prompt-level redundancy. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that QuoVLA achieves strong performance, with particularly notable improvements in generalization under visual, linguistic, and environmental distribution shifts. Our code will be made publicly available.

</details>


### [106] [X-Foresight: A Joint Vision-Action Causal Forecasting Network via Predictive World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24892)
*Baolu Li,Jingyu Qian,Rui Guo,Yilun Chen,Hanpeng Liu,Yuan Lin,Junhong Zhou,Ruixin Liu,Willow Yang,Yutong Zheng,Zhenli Zhang,Tenglong,Gu,Zhuangzhuang Ding,Pengkun Zheng,Yu Zhang,Xianming Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出X-Foresight，一种集成到VLA架构中的预测性世界模型，通过长程分块自回归策略、课程学习和时间重要性采样，有效解决了视频预测中的冗余性问题和时序困境，显著提升了自动驾驶规划性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理世界知识主要存在于视频中，VLA模型需要具备这类知识以实现安全且泛化的规划。然而，朴素的下帧预测面临两个挑战：1) 视频token低熵且冗余，导致预测退化为琐碎外推；2) 世界模型存在时序困境：密集预测能捕捉瞬时动态但无法高效建模长程因果。

Method: 1) 长程分块自回归策略：预测语义上远距离的块而非相邻帧，避免琐碎外推，同时保留块内密集帧捕捉瞬时动态，块间稀疏过渡捕捉长程因果；2) 课程学习：逐步扩展预测范围，稳定长程训练；3) 时间重要性采样：聚焦于通过自我运动和行为信号识别出的安全关键块进行监督；4) 扩散多视角渲染器用于逼真合成。

Result: X-Foresight在规划性能上显著优于VLA基线，同时保持强生成保真度。

Conclusion: X-Foresight建立了一个稳健的世界知识驱动自主系统范式，证明了将预测性世界模型集成到VLA架构中能有效提升规划能力。

Abstract: Physical world knowledge resides mainly in videos. Equipping Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with such knowledge is fundamental for safe and generalizable planning. Predictive world modeling enables VLA to internalize physical dynamics and long-term causality by predicting future video from past observations. However, naive next-frame prediction faces two challenges: 1) unlike semantically distinct text tokens, video tokens are low-entropy and redundant, causing prediction to degenerate into trivial extrapolation. 2) world modeling poses a temporal dilemma: dense prediction captures instantaneous dynamics, but cannot efficiently model long-horizon causality.
  To learn world knowledge effectively, we introduce X-Foresight, a predictive world model integrated directly into the VLA architecture to jointly learn world modeling and real-time action control. At its core lies a long-horizon chunk-wise auto-regressive strategy that addresses both challenges: by predicting semantically distant chunks rather than adjacent frames, it escapes trivial extrapolation, while preserving dense intra-chunk frames for instantaneous dynamics and sparse inter-chunk transitions for long-term causality. A curriculum learning schedule progressively extends prediction horizons and stabilizes long-horizon training. To capture long-term causality effectively, we present temporal importance sampling, which concentrates supervision on safety-critical chunks identified by ego-motion and behavioral signals. We further delegate photorealistic synthesis to a diffusion-based multi-view renderer, improving photorealistic appearance.
  Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that X-Foresight significantly outperforms VLA baselines in planning performance while maintaining strong generative fidelity, establishing a robust paradigm for world-knowledge-driven autonomous systems.

</details>


### [107] [BED-SAM2: Boundary-Enhanced-Depth SAM2 via Monocular Geometric Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24893)
*Tyler Rust,Dara McNally,Kyle O'Donnell,Colin Kelly,Chandra Kambhamettu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出BED-SAM2，通过改进SAM2编码器融入单目深度信息，5个训练周期即在显著/伪装目标检测任务上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAM2模型在下游分割任务中缺乏几何线索，导致物体边界不清晰，尤其难以处理伪装目标检测。

Method: 修改SAM2的Hiera编码器架构，使其能够直接从RGB图像编码单目深度信息，提供几何线索来增强物体边界分割和伪装目标形状提取。

Result: 在多个显著目标检测和伪装目标检测任务上，仅需5个训练周期即达到具有竞争力的SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 融入深度信息能有效提升SAM2在边界感知和伪装目标检测上的能力，且训练效率极高。

Abstract: Building upon the SAM2 vision foundation model for downstream segmentation, this study introduces Boundary Enhanced Depth (BED)-SAM2. The SAM2 Hiera encoder architecture is modified to directly encode monocular depth information from RGB images, thereby providing geometric cues that enhance object boundary delineation and facilitate the extraction of camouflaged object shapes. BED-SAM2 demonstrates competitive state-of-the-art performance across multiple salient and camouflaged object detection tasks with as few as five training epochs.

</details>


### [108] [BFS: Back-to-Front Layered Image Synthesis via Knowledge Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24894)
*Kyoungkook Kang,Gyujin Sim,Sunghyun Cho*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出BFS框架，利用双分支扩散模型和两阶段训练方案，从背景图像和用户引导中合成高质量的前景层（含物体及其视觉特效），解决了分层图像合成中数据稀缺和质量不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分层图像合成方法存在两大问题：基于分解的方法难以实现干净分离；基于生成的方法则面临训练数据获取困难，导致合成质量和场景多样性不足。

Method: 提出BFS框架，采用双分支扩散架构，两个相互连接的分支分别生成合成图像和前景层，实现双向知识迁移。利用易学习的非分层图像合成知识辅助前景合成，并设计两阶段训练方案，使用高质量非分层合成图像数据集来提升前景层质量。

Result: 大量实验（含用户研究）表明，BFS能生成高质量的分层图像，在各项指标上持续优于先前方法。

Conclusion: BFS通过巧妙的双分支扩散框架和训练策略，有效解决了分层图像合成中的数据稀缺问题，为可控且富有创造性的图像编辑提供了有力工具。

Abstract: As generative models expand the possibilities of visual content creation, layered image synthesis has emerged as a promising direction for controllable and creative editing. However, existing methods struggle to fully realize this potential. Decomposition-based methods often struggle with clean separation, while generation-based methods suffer from difficulty in training data acquisition, reducing quality and scene diversity. In this paper, we propose BFS, a novel generation-based framework for layered image synthesis. Specifically, given a background image and user guidance, BFS synthesizes a foreground layer that incorporates not only a foreground object but also its associated visual effects, such as shadows and reflections, while seamlessly harmonizing with the background to produce a coherent composite. To enable diverse and high-quality foreground layer synthesis while overcoming data scarcity, we leverage the comparatively easy-to-learn knowledge of unlayered image synthesis for the foreground synthesis. To this end, we adopt a dual-branch diffusion framework in which two interconnected branches generate a composite image and a foreground layer, respectively, enabling bidirectional knowledge transfer. Based on this framework, we propose a two-stage training scheme that utilizes a high-quality unlayered composite image dataset to effectively enhance foreground quality. Extensive experiments, including a user study, show that BFS produces high-quality layered images, consistently outperforming prior methods.

</details>


### [109] [Where Detectors Fail: Probing Generative Space for Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24906)
*Zijie Cao,Weijie Tu,Yao Xiao,Weijian Deng,Liang Lin,Pengxu Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出PROBE框架，通过主动探索生成过程的困难区域来提升AI生成图像检测器的泛化能力，利用检测器作为评判者引导生成器产生难以分类的样本，从而暴露并修复检测弱点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器在面对未见过的生成器时泛化能力不足，仅靠扩大数据规模效果有限，因为训练数据对生成变化的覆盖不够充分。

Method: 提出PROBE框架：将检测器作为评判者，通过流形级别的修改主动引导生成器产生难以分类的样本，这些样本暴露了标准采样下不常见的失败案例，用于进一步优化检测器。

Result: 在多个基准测试上，PROBE框架增强了对未见生成器的泛化能力，取得了更优的检测性能。

Conclusion: 通过主动探索生成过程中的困难区域来训练检测器，比被动依赖大规模数据采样更有效，为提升AIGI检测泛化性提供了新思路。

Abstract: Detecting AI-generated images (AIGI) remains challenging because detectors often fail to generalize to unseen generators. Although existing methods are trained on large datasets, their performance still degrades when generation settings change, indicating that data scale alone is insufficient and that limited coverage of generative variations during training is a key factor. Studies on generative model editing show that small changes in internal representations can produce diverse and meaningful image variations, many of which are not explored under standard sampling. Leveraging this insight, we propose PROBE (Probing Robustness via Boundary Exploration), a framework that improves detector generalization by actively exploring challenging regions of the generative process. Instead of treating the generator as a fixed data source, PROBE uses the detector as a critic to steer the generator through manifold-level modifications, producing realistic samples that are difficult to classify. These samples expose failure cases that are uncommon under standard data sampling strategies and are used to refine the detector. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks indicate that PROBE enhances generalization to unseen generators, resulting in more generalizable AIGI detection performance. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Amamiya-C/PROBE-AIGI-Detection

</details>


### [110] [MambaDSF: Multi-Scale SSM with Dilated Feature Fusion for Sonar Small Target Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24928)
*Hui Lin,Jiayi Li,Jing Wang,Shenghui Rong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MambaDSF是一个混合框架，结合Mamba与CNN，通过MambaEFP主干、DFMamba编码器和SA-WIoU/CSC损失函数，在UATD前视声纳基准上达到91.5% mAP50，有效提升了小目标检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有声纳小目标检测面临像素覆盖不足、声学对比度低、尺度模糊等挑战。CNN缺乏全局上下文难以抑制噪声误报，Transformer计算成本高，现有Mamba模型缺乏多尺度语义对齐、多感受野融合及小目标感知训练监督。

Method: 提出MambaDSF，包含三个创新：1) MambaEFP主干，以线性复杂度联合捕获局部回声线索和全局声学上下文；2) DFMamba编码器，强制跨金字塔层级的多尺度特征对齐；3) SA-WIoU和CSC损失函数，稳定小目标训练过程。

Result: UATD基准上91.5% mAP50，2870万参数，超越所有对比检测器；小目标子集上提升+2.2个百分点；跨域评估（FLS和MD-FLS）验证了泛化能力。

Conclusion: MambaDSF有效解决了声纳小目标检测中的多尺度对齐和小目标感知问题，在性能和泛化性上均表现出色。

Abstract: Sonar imaging is the primary modality for underwater target detection, yet small targets remain difficult to detect due to insufficient pixel coverage, low acoustic contrast, and scale ambiguity across imaging ranges. CNN-based detectors extract local features efficiently but cannot suppress noise-induced false alarms without global acoustic context. Transformer-based methods capture long-range dependencies at quadratic computational cost. Existing Mamba-based vision models offer efficient linear-cost scanning but lack multi-scale semantic alignment across pyramid levels, multi-receptive-field fusion, and small-target-aware training supervision needed for reliable sonar detection.
  This letter proposes Mamba Dilated-Scale Fusion (MambaDSF), a hybrid framework addressing these limitations through three contributions: a Mamba Enhanced Feature Pyramid (MambaEFP) backbone that jointly captures local echo cues and global acoustic context at linear complexity; a Dilate Fusion Mamba (DFMamba) encoder that enforces multi-scale feature alignment across pyramid levels; and Scale-Adaptive Weighted IoU (SA-WIoU) and Cross-Scale Coherence (CSC) losses that stabilize small-target training. MambaDSF achieves 91.5% mAP50 on the UATD forward-looking sonar benchmark with 28.7 million parameters, surpassing all compared detectors. On a small-target subset the gain reached +2.2 percentage points, and cross-domain evaluation on FLS and MD-FLS confirms the generalization of the proposed architecture. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/IDontKnowAAA/MambaDSF.

</details>


### [111] [X-Edit: Exact, Explicit, and Explainable Null-Space Editing for Medical Vision Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24932)
*Yuanye Liu,Siyuan Zhou,Ke Zhang,Lei Li,Wei Chen,Xiahai Zhuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出X-Edit，一种基于零空间投影的精确模型编辑框架，用于在保持原有诊断能力的前提下修正Vision Transformer在医学图像分类中的错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练ViT在临床场景中难免出现错误预测，传统微调存在灾难性遗忘问题，严重危及临床安全。亟需一种既理论严谨又可解释的主动干预机制。

Method: 1. 通过因果追踪定位影响错误预测的关键层；2. 从锚点集构建正交零空间投影矩阵；3. 将参数更新严格约束在该零空间内，以几何方式保证修正错误的同时不扰动已有诊断表征。
