### [403] [Creative Quality Alignment: Expert Tacit Knowledge Transfer via Chain-of-Thought Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25977)
*Bo Zou,Chao Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文实证实现了Calibrated Surprise中的创意质量指标，证明在极低数据成本和小模型条件下，仅需约100个专家CoT注释即可实现创意质量对齐。核心理论贡献是发现单条件分布架构中，校准欣赏侧会自动通过架构对偶性传递到生成侧。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证Calibrated Surprise提出的创意质量指标在工程层面是否成立，尤其是在最严格的低数据成本和小模型条件下。

Method: 使用BC Protocol生成的约100个专家CoT注释作为训练数据，在低数据成本和小基础模型条件下进行实证，并识别了数据偏差（公开对齐数据集偏向工艺知识，缺乏受众建模和现实逻辑覆盖）。

Result: 在严格工程条件下，约100个CoT示例足以实现创意质量对齐。理论层面发现：单条件分布架构中，校准欣赏侧会通过架构对偶性自动迁移到生成侧。

Conclusion: 创意质量对齐（CQA）在低数据成本下可行，且提供了一种不同于纯经验观察（如LIMA）的结构性理论解释，解释了为何少量数据足够。

Abstract: This paper provides an empirical implementation of the creative quality metric proposed in Calibrated Surprise (Zou & Xu, 2026a). The question this paper addresses is: does this mathematical claim hold at the engineering level?
  To make the answer as general as possible, we deliberately choose the strictest engineering conditions: low data cost and a small base model. Training data comes from approximately 100 expert chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations produced by the BC Protocol (Zou & Xu, 2026b).
  We also identify a data bias: most publicly available alignment datasets are skewed toward craft-related knowledge, while audience modeling and reality-logic coverage are systematically weak.
  We use the term Creative Quality Alignment (CQA) to describe this class of engineering methods. We also offer a supporting theoretical observation: in an LLM with a single conditional distribution architecture, calibrating the appreciation side automatically transfers to the generation side via architectural duality. This is the structural reason why ~100 CoT examples are sufficient -- not a purely empirical observation like LIMA (Zhou et al., 2023).

</details>


### [404] [When Do LLM Agents Treat Surface Noise Differently from Semantic Noise? A 68-Cell Measurement Study with a Held-Out Trace-Level Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25981)
*Liyun Zhang,Jiayi Guo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了推理链与ReAct智能体在十种大语言模型下的语义敏感性问题：相比格式、重排等呈现扰动，同义替换等语义扰动显著更易导致最终答案改变（一致性差距平均+19.69pp）。多种压力测试部分验证了该效应，并在留出模型上得到复现。作者进一步提出"隐蔽发散"机制解释语义扰动如何影响中间推理步骤。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型在链式推理与ReAct智能体中，不同类型扰动（语义 vs. 呈现）对最终答案一致性的影响差异，并检验已有机制解释的可靠性。

Method: 在GSM8K、MATH、HotpotQA三个数据集上，对10个LLM（7个架构族）生成的原版轨迹（1,530条）及其~11,150个变体进行扰动实验。通过严重性匹配、四种代理审计、聚类bootstrap、跨架构生成器交换、第二LLM评判等多种压力测试验证效应。在留出模型上进行1,800条轨迹的复现，并追踪四个trace级机制信号。

Result: 语义扰动比呈现扰动导致更高不一致性，一致性差距平均+19.79个百分点（64/68单元格为正）。留出模型复现中3/4单元格为正，效应虽小但显著。两个先前声称的机制未能复现并被撤回，新的"隐蔽发散"机制得到支持：语义扰动保留首步动作但使后续推理产生发散，伴随稍深的推理轨迹。

Conclusion: 本研究提供了关于语义扰动如何影响LLM推理鲁棒性的系统性测量贡献，包含留出复现和部分trace级机制解释。语义扰动通过隐蔽的中间步发散影响最终答案，而非先前认为的机制。

Abstract: We document an empirical phenomenon in chain-of-thought and ReAct agents driven by ten large language models from seven architecture families: meaning-bearing perturbations (e.g., paraphrase, synonym) alter final answers more often than presentation perturbations (e.g., formatting, reordering) of comparable severity. Across 68 cells spanning GSM8K, MATH, and HotpotQA (1,530 originals and $\sim$11,150 variants), the inconsistency gap averages +19.69 pp after severity matching (paired $t=9.58$, $p<0.0001$), with 64/68 cells positive. The gap survives four severity-proxy audits and remains significant when excluding qwen models (+11.10 pp, $p<0.0001$). Several stress tests fail honestly: cluster-bootstrap significance disappears under stricter assumptions, tractability contrasts do not replicate, cross-architecture generator swaps break per-cell rankings, and a second LLM judge yields only moderate agreement ($κ=0.50$).
  We then validate the headline effect on a fully held-out 11th model (qwen2.5-14B-Instruct; 1,800 trajectories) and re-test a pre-registered capability$\times$tractability partition, observing a small but positive held-out effect (3/4 cells positive; pooled Welch $t=3.81$, $p=9.6\times10^{-4}$). Using held-out trajectories, we probe four trace-level mechanism signals. Two prior mechanism claims fail to replicate and are explicitly retracted. Two new probes instead support a \emph{stealth-divergence} picture: semantic perturbations often preserve the first action but induce divergence in intermediate reasoning from later steps onward, accompanied by slightly deeper trajectories. We position this as a measurement contribution with held-out replication and a partial trace-level account of how semantic perturbations propagate through agent reasoning. Code, perturbation corpus, raw trajectories, and analysis scripts are released anonymously for review.

</details>


### [405] [SafeCtrl-RL: Inference-Time Adaptive Behaviour Control for LLM Dialogue via RL-Driven Prompt Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25984)
*Michael Orme,Yanchao Yu,Zhiyuan Tan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SafeCtrl-RL 是一个推理时行为控制框架，通过强化学习动态调整提示策略，在不重新训练模型的情况下提升 LLM 的安全性和响应质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保 LLM 在部署时能够产生安全且符合上下文的行为，同时避免高昂的模型重训练或参数修改成本。

Method: 将对话生成建模为序列决策过程，使用强化学习智能体基于上下文反馈动态选择提示调整策略，通过迭代优化抑制不安全行为（推理时行为遗忘）。

Result: 在多种 LLM 和不安全对话场景下，SafeCtrl-RL 持续提升了安全性和响应质量，优于现有的基于提示的优化方法，并在性能与效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Conclusion: SafeCtrl-RL 提供了一种无需模型重训练的有效推理时安全控制方案，具有实用性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Ensuring safe and contextually appropriate behaviour in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a critical challenge for real-world deployment. We present \textbf{SafeCtrl-RL}, an inference-time behavioural control framework that enables adaptive safety regulation without model retraining or parameter modification. The method formulates dialogue generation as a sequential decision process, where a reinforcement learning agent dynamically selects prompt adjustment strategies based on contextual feedback. This allows unsafe behaviours to be suppressed through iterative refinement, which we conceptualise as inference-time behavioural unlearning. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and unsafe dialogue scenarios, SafeCtrl-RL consistently improves safety and response quality, outperforms existing prompt-based optimisation methods, and achieves favourable performance--efficiency trade-offs. **Warning: This paper may contain examples of harmful language, and reader discretion is recommended.

</details>


### [406] [What Makes a Medical Checker Trainable? Diagnosing Signal Collapse and Reward Hacking in Checker-Guided RAG for Biomedical QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25988)
*Yuelyu Ji,Min Gu Kwak,Hang Zhang,Xizhi Wu,Chenyu Li,Yanshan Wan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 在医疗RAG系统中，使用NLI检查器作为过程奖励训练GRPO模型时，检查器的输出分布（而非准确率）决定梯度是否可训练。研究发现：log-prob评分导致信号崩溃（97%中性标签），而校准分类器有效；中等强度信号比强信号产生更优答案（+12% BERTScore）；信号强度具有策略依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗RAG需要基于证据的回答，因此将声明级NLI检查器接入检索增强强化学习是直观的。需要探究NLI检查器作为过程奖励的有效性条件。

Method: 比较四种NLI检查器后端作为过程奖励，在GRPO训练的医疗RAG智能体（Qwen2.5-7B为主，Qwen3-4B和Llama-3.1-8B复现）上，跨四个医疗QA基准进行实验。

Result: (i) 信号崩溃是log-prob特有的：LLM log-prob评分导致97%以上标签为中性，梯度消失；校准的MedNLI分类器则产生非退化分布。(ii) 中等信号优于强信号：强专有检查器触发三步奖励黑客级联（超短回答、回避搜索、语言崩溃），中等信号局部分类器训练出更优模型（+12% BERTScore）。(iii) 信号强度具有策略依赖性。

Conclusion: 这些发现构成了"验证器即奖励"系统的边界条件，为医疗RAG中NLI检查器作为过程奖励的使用提供了设计准则。

Abstract: Medical RAG needs evidence-grounded claims, so plugging a claim-level NLI checker into retrieval-augmented RL is intuitive. \textbf{We find that the checker's \emph{output distribution} during training, not its held-out accuracy, decides whether it provides trainable gradient.} We compare four NLI checker back-ends as process rewards inside a GRPO-trained medical RAG agent (Qwen2.5-7B, replicated on Qwen3-4B and Llama-3.1-8B) across four held-out medical QA benchmarks. Three diagnostic findings emerge. \textbf{(i)} Signal collapse is log-prob-specific: LLM log-probability scoring labels over 97\% of claims neutral -- collapsing the RL gradient to zero -- while a calibrated MedNLI classifier scores the same pairs non-degenerately. \textbf{(ii)} Moderate signal beats strong signal on answer quality: a strong proprietary checker triggers a three-step reward-hacking cascade -- ultra-short answers, search avoidance, language collapse -- so a moderate-signal local classifier trains a higher-quality model (\textbf{+12\% BERTScore over zero-shot, no GPT dependency}). \textbf{(iii)} Signal strength is policy-dependent: the same checker registers as moderate on one policy but strong on another without triggering the cascade end-state. We frame these as boundary conditions for verifier-as-reward systems.

</details>


### [407] [AI-Assisted Systematization for Evaluating GenAI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26001)
*Dhruv Agarwal,Emily Sheng,Chad Atalla,Jean Garcia-Gathright,Hussein Mozannar,Hannah Washington,Alexandra Chouldechova,Solon Barocas,Hanna Wallach*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出概念系统化（concept systematization）是评估生成式AI系统前缺失的关键步骤，并引入概念规范（concept spec）和验证工作表作为结构化表示，开发了两种AI辅助系统化方法（直接零样本方法与多智能体方法），在仇恨言论和数字共情两个概念上验证了其内容效度和信息可恢复性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI评估中许多目标概念（如"推理"、"公平性"、"创造力"）过于宽泛且具有争议性，缺乏明确界定导致难以确定测量内容或解释评估结果。作者意识到需要填补"系统化"这一缺失步骤——即将模糊的背景概念转化为明确、可测量的结构化描述——但人工系统化认知负担重、资源消耗大，因此探索AI辅助的可能性。

Method: 作者首先设计了概念规范（concept spec）作为系统化概念的结构化表示，并配套验证工作表。然后开发了两种AI辅助系统化方法：1）直接零样本方法（direct zero-shot）；2）多智能体方法（multi-agent），后者更贴近文献中人工系统化的流程。在两个概念（仇恨言论与数字共情）上应用这些系统化器生成概念规范，并通过内容效度和信息可恢复性两个维度进行评估。

Result: 两种AI辅助系统化方法均成功生成了概念规范，并在内容效度和信息可恢复性上进行了评估。具体结果需查看完整论文获取详细定量和定性分析。

Conclusion: AI辅助可以支持概念系统化这一认知密集型过程，通过结构化的概念规范和验证工作表，有助于将评估中模糊的概念转化为可操作、可测量的形式，从而提升GenAI评估的严谨性和可解释性。

Abstract: Evaluating generative AI (GenAI) systems is challenging because many targets of evaluation are broad, contested concepts, such as "reasoning," "fairness," or "creativity." When these concepts are left underspecified, it becomes unclear what should be measured or how evaluation results should be interpreted. This problem reflects a missing step: systematization, that is, moving from a broad background concept to an explicit, structured account of the concept in measurable terms. To help address the fact that systematization is cognitively demanding and resource-intensive, we investigate whether AI assistance can support this process. To enable AI-assisted systematization and assess its quality, we introduce a structured representation of a systematized concept, a concept spec, and a validation worksheet. We then develop two AI-assisted systematizers: a direct, zero-shot approach and a multi-agent approach that more closely mirrors manual systematization approaches from existing literature. We use these systematizers to produce concept specs for two concepts -- hate-based rhetoric and digital empathy -- and evaluate resulting concept specs on content validity and information recoverability.

</details>


### [408] [Forgotten Words: Benchmarking NeoBERT for Dementia Detection in Low-Resource Conversational Filipino and English Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26007)
*Rez Samantha Z. Floresca,Edric Castel C. Hao,Hannah Grachiella Buñales,Chelsea Dominique E. Temprosa,Georgianna Z. Reyes,Kervin Gabriel L. Chua*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统评估了基于Transformer的菲律宾语（含英语-菲律宾语代码转换）痴呆症检测，构建了含4000条平行双语语料，发现双语微调可消除跨语言性能下降（Macro-F1达0.969-0.973），表明多语言临床NLP性能主要由训练时的语言覆盖驱动，而非模型规模或架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有痴呆症语音检测系统以英语为中心，缺乏对菲律宾语（尤其是菲律宾语-英语代码转换场景）的研究，亟需填补这一空白。

Method: 构建了4000条DementiaBank导出的平行双语数据集（含人工菲律宾语翻译），评估五种模型家族（TF-IDF+LogReg、BERT、NeoBERT、XLM-R、RoBERTa-Tagalog）在单语、零样本跨语言和双语微调三种设置下的表现。

Result: 英语训练的BERT迁移至菲律宾语时Macro-F1降至0.455；架构现代化（NeoBERT）未提升鲁棒性；双语微调使所有Transformer模型Macro-F1收敛至0.969-0.973，消除跨语言退化。

Conclusion: 多语言临床NLP性能的关键在于训练时的语言覆盖，而非模型规模或架构创新。

Abstract: Dementia detection from spontaneous speech offers a scalable approach to cognitive screening, yet NLP systems remain predominantly English-centric. This limitation is especially acute in the Philippines, where Filipino-English code-switching is pervasive and no prior work has addressed NLP-based dementia detection. We present the first systematic evaluation of transformer-based dementia detection in Filipino speech and the first assessment of NeoBERT in a clinical NLP setting. To separate language from domain effects, we construct a parallel bilingual dataset of 4,000 DementiaBank-derived transcripts, with Filipino translations produced manually to preserve discourse-level markers of cognitive decline. We evaluate five model families, TF-IDF + LogReg, BERT, NeoBERT, XLM-R, and RoBERTa-Tagalog, under monolingual, zero-shot cross-lingual, and bilingual fine-tuning settings. We find that in-domain performance does not transfer across languages, with English-trained BERT dropping to Macro-F1 = 0.455 on Filipino, and that architectural modernization alone does not improve robustness. Bilingual fine-tuning, however, eliminates cross-lingual degradation across all transformer models, converging to Macro-F1 = 0.969-0.973. These results suggest that multilingual clinical NLP performance is driven primarily by linguistic coverage during training rather than model scale or architecture.

</details>


### [409] [Peak-Then-Collapse and the Four Interface Channels of Knowledge-Graph Tool Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26037)
*Tianda Sun,Dimitar Kazakov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现标准RLVR工具使用训练（GRPO）在最小知识图谱API上会出现"先达峰后崩溃"的失败模式，并证明这种崩溃源于接口反馈缺乏自然语言信号，而单纯增加奖励密度或模型规模均无法解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究标准RLVR工具使用训练在面对缺乏自然语言反馈的接口（如知识图谱API返回空列表[]）时的表现，揭示其潜在的退化机制。

Method: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct上使用GRPO训练，采用最小Freebase知识图谱API（4个导航动词），设计7种不同奖励方案，并进行种子复现、消融实验（注入黄金关系）和自蒸馏缓解实验。

Result: 工具回答率从3.8%升至9.6%后骤降至0%（单次窗口内崩溃）；7种奖励设计均出现四种失败模式中的某一种；注入黄金关系仅提升0.20pp准确率；95.4%错误为检索组合失败；自蒸馏可达40.0% EM，但模型从7B扩至14B仅提升0.25pp。

Conclusion: 接口反馈缺乏自然语言信号是导致RLVR训练崩溃的根本原因，且无法通过同族奖励设计或扩大模型规模解决；自蒸馏作为缓解手段有效但存在容量不变性天花板。

Abstract: We test the standard RLVR tool-use recipe -- GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct -- on a deliberately minimal knowledge-graph tool API: four Freebase navigation verbs over Complex WebQuestions. Under a self-verifiable retrieval reward, the policy's tool-grounded answer rate climbs from $3.8\%$ to $9.6\%$ over 250 steps, then collapses to $0\%$ within a single 50-step window -- a \emph{peak-then-collapse} pattern replicated across four seeds. Across seven reward designs, we find four recurring failure modes: adding denser or more targeted proxy rewards shifts the failure mode rather than eliminating it. We argue that a key difference from Python interpreters, web search, and JSON APIs is interface feedback: their failures often leak natural-language signal the model saw in pretraining. A Python traceback names the failing line; an empty Freebase result \texttt{[]} does not. Stripping away that surface exposes a degradation regime that same-family reward redesigns do not fix. A direct oracle ablation rules out relation selection: injecting gold relations at every retrieval call lifts exact-match accuracy by only $+0.20$~pp, and $95.4\%$ of retrieval-dependent errors are retrieval-composition failures rather than answer-extraction failures. As a mitigation, one-iteration self-distillation reaches $40.0\%$ EM at 7B and is capacity-invariant: doubling capacity to 14B improves EM by only $0.25$~pp, and initialization barely matters -- the ceiling appears interface-bound within the 7B--14B range tested.

</details>


### [410] [Confidence and Calibration of Activation Oracles for Reliable Interpretation of Language Model Internals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26045)
*Federico Torrielli,Peter Schneider-Kamp,Lukas Galke Poech*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究激活预言机的不确定性量化方法，发现bootstrap模式频率校准最佳（ECE 5.7%），而log-prob基线可作为低成本快速信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 激活预言机能帮助人类理解其他模型的激活值，但其自然语言输出的不确定性量化（UQ）尚未得到充分研究。

Method: 在6种置信度估计方法中，对每个预言机使用6000个样本（变化verbalizer和上下文提示），评估校准效果。

Result: bootstrap模式频率校准最佳（Qwen3-8B上ECE 5.7% vs log-prob的25.5%；Qwen3.6-27B上10.3% vs 13.1%）；log-prob基线成本低但可作为快速分诊信号。

Conclusion: 激活预言机的不确定性量化可行且重要，不同方法之间校准效果差异显著，推荐bootstrap模式频率用于高精度场景，log-prob用于低成本快速筛选。

Abstract: Activation oracles aim to make the activations of other models legible to humans and yield promising results compared to white-box interpretability techniques. However, uncertainty quantification (UQ) for the natural-language outputs of such activation oracles is so far understudied. Here, we investigate 6 different methods for estimating the confidence of activation oracles and evaluate how well-calibrated their confidence scores are. Our experiments on 6,000 samples per oracle (varying verbalizer and context prompts) reveal that bootstrap mode frequency is the best-calibrated method among those tested (ECE 5.7% vs. 25.5% for the answer-word log-probability on Qwen3-8B; 10.3% vs. 13.1% on Qwen3.6-27B), and that the log-prob baseline can serve as a fast triage signal at a fraction of the cost.
  Code and the patched trainer are available at https://github.com/federicotorrielli/probabilistic_activation_oracles.

</details>


### [411] [WhoSaidIt: Human-LLM Collaborative Annotation for Text-Based Multilingual Speaker-Attribute Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26070)
*Lingyu Gao,Will Monroe,David Smith,Meghan Jemison,Jackie Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种人机协作的标注框架，通过LLM与专家迭代交互、分歧导向采样，构建了多语言说话人属性数据集WhoSaidIt，揭示了跨语言标注差异与LLM在说话人属性分类中的能力与局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言环境下文本中的说话人属性标注存在固有的歧义性，社会文化线索隐晦且因语言而异，而实际资源有限，需要一种有效的跨语言标注稳定化方法。

Method: 构建人类-LLM协作的重新标注框架：从含噪语料出发，通过LLM与专家反复交互提炼标注理据，采用分歧导向采样进行针对性重新标注；最终构建包含9种说话人属性标签的多语言数据集WhoSaidIt。

Result: 量化了原始标注与修订标注之间的偏差，评估了主流LLM的性能，分析了明确标注理据（rationales）对模型行为的影响；发现显著的跨语言标注决策差异，揭示了LLM在该任务上的优势与局限。

Conclusion: 人机协作的重新标注框架能有效提升多语言说话人属性标注的稳定性，但跨语言差异仍然显著，LLM在处理隐式文化线索方面仍需改进。

Abstract: Annotating speaker attributes from text is inherently ambiguous, particularly in multilingual settings where demographic and social cues are implicit and culturally variable. We propose a human-large language model (LLM) collaborative re-annotation framework for stabilizing multilingual speaker-attribute labels under practical resource constraints. Starting from a noisy corpus, we use LLMs to surface recurring annotation rationales through iterative interaction with experts, and apply disagreement-focused sampling for targeted re-annotation. Using this framework, we construct WhoSaidIt, a multilingual dataset covering nine speaker-attribute labels. We quantify divergence between original and revised annotations, benchmark recent LLMs, and analyze the effect of explicit rationales on model behavior. Our results reveal substantial cross-lingual differences in annotation decisions and demonstrate both the strengths and limitations of LLMs in speaker-attribute classification.

</details>


### [412] [StakeBench: Evaluating Language Understanding Grounded in Market Commitment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26074)
*Yunhua Pei,Jingyu Hu,Yiwei Shi,Hongnan Ma,Weiru Liu,John Cartlidge*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: StakeBench是一个基于金融市场真实交易行为（而非人工标注）评估语言模型理解能力的框架。它利用Polymarket和Manifold平台上的56万条评论及对应交易记录，设计了四个诊断任务。测试15个LLM后发现，模型只能部分识别持仓方向（准确率0.506-0.599），但在预测未来行动和集体赔率预测上表现失败，且模型规模、金融领域微调均无帮助。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有金融NLP基准依赖外部标注，衡量的是语言被"感知"的方式而非说话者在市场中的实际承诺。研究者希望基于真实市场行为（而非人工标注）来评估语言理解能力，以更客观地反映模型对金融市场语言的掌握程度。

Method: StakeBench构建流程：从Polymarket和Manifold收集2,261个已结算市场的560,876条评论，关联持仓方向、交易行为和赔率轨迹等真实市场数据替代人工标注。设计四项诊断任务：市场承诺检测、持仓方向识别、未来行动预测、集体赔率预测。提出三种承诺感知指标衡量与"揭示偏好"的对齐程度，并设计有效性审计和解释边界以区分可观察的承诺信号与潜在信念。

Result: 在15个LLM、18个主题和平台设置上的测试结果：模型在持仓方向识别上表现中等（定向准确率0.506-0.599）；未来行动预测任务中10/15个模型退化到只预测1-2个标签；集体赔率预测中无模型持续优于朴素基线；模型规模与性能无相关；金融领域微调未改善识别效果；平台激励机制显著影响高阶任务结果。

Conclusion: 现有LLM在理解金融市场承诺方面存在结构性缺陷，尤其是在预测未来行为和集体赔率预测等复杂任务上表现失败。这揭示了当前语言模型在捕捉市场承诺信号方面的根本性局限，也为未来金融NLP研究提供了新的评估方向和挑战。

Abstract: Existing financial NLP benchmarks often rely on labels supplied by outside observers, measuring how language is perceived rather than what speakers have committed to in the market. We introduce StakeBench, an evaluation framework for language understanding grounded in market commitment. StakeBench links 560,876 comments from 2,261 resolved markets to verified position, action, and market-odds records across Polymarket and Manifold. Supervision is derived from observable market behavior. Position sides, post-comment trading actions, and market-odds trajectories replace human annotation. Four diagnostic tasks test whether models detect market commitment, identify the revealed side, anticipate future action, and perform collective odds projection. Three commitment-aware metrics measure alignment with revealed preferences rather than perceived sentiment. Validity audits and explicit interpretation boundaries help distinguish observable commitment signals from latent belief and causal market-odds impact. Across 15 LLMs and 18 topics and platform settings, models partially recover position-side signals, with Directed Accuracy from 0.506 to 0.599, but show structural failures on later tasks. Ten of the fifteen models collapse to one or two action labels in future action anticipation, and no model consistently improves on the naive odds-direction baseline in collective odds projection. Model scale is not correlated with performance, finance-domain tuning does not improve revealed-side identification, and platform incentives strongly shape higher-order results. StakeBench is packaged with evaluation code and dataset under CC-BY 4.0.

</details>


### [413] [Automated Benchmark Auditing for AI Agents and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26079)
*Junlin Wang,Federico Bianchi,Shang Zhu,Fan Nie,Yongchan Kwon,Bhuwan Dhingra,James Zou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA)框架，系统审计168个基准测试任务，发现25.7%的任务存在设计缺陷，修正后模型排名变化且性能提升约10%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AI基准测试复杂度超出传统验证方法，领域专家编写的任务常含隐性假设、不完整环境规范和脆弱评估逻辑，人工标注难以可靠发现这些问题。

Method: 提出ABA代理框架，系统审计单个基准测试任务，自动发现隐藏环境依赖、规范缺口和有限评分逻辑等问题。

Result: 在168个基准测试（涵盖9个领域）中，ABA识别出25.7%的任务存在关键问题；过滤问题任务后，SWE-bench Verified和Terminal-Bench 2的平均性能分别提升9.9%和9.6%，且模型排名发生变化。

Conclusion: 基准测试中的问题任务严重扭曲了智能体和LLM的能力评估；ABA工具可用于支持前沿基准测试的未来开发。

Abstract: Modern AI benchmarks operate at a complexity that outpaces traditional verification methods. Tasks authored by domain experts often contain implicit assumptions, incomplete environment specifications, and brittle evaluation logic that human annotation cannot reliably catch. We introduce Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA), an agentic framework that systematically audits individual benchmark tasks, uncovering issues such as hidden environment dependencies, specification gaps, and limited grading logic. We run ABA on a collection of frontier LLM benchmarks and previous NeurIPS publications, totaling 168 benchmarks across nine domains. Across this corpus, ABA identifies critical issues including ambiguous task design, execution environment conflicts, and incorrect ground truths in over 25.7% of the evaluated tasks. The precision of these automated audits is validated by expert review and independent third-party reports such as upstream PRs. Crucially, we demonstrate that these problematic tasks severely distorts capability assessments for agents and LLMs: filtering out these tasks with issues shifts model rankings and increases average performance on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2 by 9.9% and 9.6%, respectively. We release the agentic tool and all task annotations to support the future development of frontier benchmarks.

</details>


### [414] [Language Models Need Sleep](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26099)
*Sangyun Lee,Sean McLeish,Tom Goldstein,Giulia Fanti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种类似睡眠的机制，让大语言模型周期性地将近期上下文转化为持久性的快速权重，并清空键值缓存，从而扩展其处理长上下文的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer的注意力机制随着上下文长度增长而扩展性差，难以处理长程任务。

Method: 模型在"睡眠"阶段对积累的上下文进行N次离线循环处理，通过局部学习规则更新SSM块中的快速权重，随后清空键值缓存。推理时，计算被转移到睡眠阶段，保持清醒预测的低延迟。

Result: 在细胞自动机、多跳图检索和数学推理任务上，该方法优于普通Transformer和SSM-注意力混合模型。增加睡眠时长N可提升性能，对需要深层推理的样本效果最显著。

Conclusion: 睡眠式巩固机制能有效提升长程任务表现，且计算效率更高。

Abstract: Transformer-based large language models are increasingly used for long-horizon tasks; however, their attention mechanism scales poorly with context length. To handle this, we study a sleep-like consolidation mechanism in which a model periodically converts recent context into persistent fast weights before clearing its key-value cache. During sleep, the model performs $N$ offline recurrent passes over the accumulated context and updates the fast weights in its state-space model (SSM) blocks through a learned local rule. During inference, this shifts extra computation to sleep while preserving the latency of wake-time prediction. We test our method on controlled synthetic tasks, including cellular automata and multi-hop graph retrieval, as well as a realistic math reasoning task, on which a regular transformer as well as SSM-attention hybrid models fail. We then show that increasing sleep duration $N$ for our models improves performance, with the largest gains on examples that require deeper reasoning.

</details>


### [415] [Tokenizer Fertility and Zero-Shot Performance of Foundation Models on Ukrainian Legal Text: A Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14890)
*Volodymyr Ovcharov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究对七个基础模型在乌克兰法律文本上的tokenizer fertility（差异达1.6倍）和零样本性能进行了基准测试，发现Qwen 3比Llama系列多消耗60% tokens，NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3以更低成本取得最佳性能，少样本提示反而降低性能，并揭示了战时法律语言导致模型性能显著下降的跨时间泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tokenizer fertility（标记器生育率）这一影响部署成本的关键维度在模型选择实践中被完全忽视，且乌克兰语在法务NLP基准中缺失，研究者希望填补这一空白。

Method: 对来自乌克兰国家登记处（EDRSR）的273份经核验的法院判决，对七个模型（来自五家提供商）进行tokenizer fertility测量和三项任务的零样本性能测试，并进行少样本消融实验和跨时间泛化实验（2008-2026年）。

Result: (1) Qwen 3比Llama系列多消耗60% tokens；(2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B) 以综合得分83.1超越Mistral Large 3（参数多5.6倍），API成本仅为后者的1/3；(3) 少样本提示性能下降多达26个百分点；(4) 基于战前数据（2008-2013）训练的分类器在战时数据（2022-2026）上性能下降27.9个百分点，新模型向后转移表现更好。

Conclusion: Tokenzier分析应优先于模型选择，零样本比少样本更适合形态丰富的语言；研究者发布了包含14,452份法院判决的公开数据集，覆盖三个时间阶段，以支持可重复性研究。

Abstract: Tokenizer fertility varies 1.6x across foundation models on Ukrainian legal text, yet this cost-critical dimension is absent from model selection practice. We benchmark seven models from five providers on 273 validated court decisions from Ukraine's state registry (EDRSR), measuring tokenizer fertility and zero-shot performance on three tasks. Four findings emerge. (1) Qwen 3 models consume 60% more tokens than Llama-family models on identical input, making tokenizer analysis a prerequisite for cost-efficient deployment. (2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B) achieves the highest composite score (83.1), outperforming Mistral Large 3 (5.6x more total parameters) at one-third the API cost model scale is a poor proxy for domain performance. (3) Few-shot prompting degrades performance by up to 26 percentage points; stratified and prompt-sensitivity ablations confirm this is intrinsic to Ukrainian-language demonstrations, not an artifact of example selection. (4) A cross-temporal generalization experiment reveals that classifiers trained on pre-war court ecisions (2008-2013) lose 27.9 percentage points when applied to full-scale invasion era decisions (2022-2026), with a pronounced forward-backward asymmetry: newer models transfer backward (+14.6 pp above forward transfer), but older models fail catastrophically on wartime legal language. For practitioners: tokenizer analysis should precede model selection, and zero-shot is a more reliable default than few-shot for morphologically rich languages. To support reproducibility and address the absence of Ukrainian from legal NLP benchmarks, we release a public dataset of 14,452 court decisions spanning 2008-2026, annotated with seven outcome labels across three temporal epochs that capture the impact of armed conflict on judicial proceedings.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [416] [FLUID: Slack-based Low-latency Delivery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23947)
*Michael Luby*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: FLUID 是一种利用喷泉编码和接收方反馈的协议，通过引入受控冗余（松弛参数ε）降低数据块在丢包网络中的传输延迟，在接近ARQ带宽最优的同时实现更少的传输轮次。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ARQ协议在丢包网络中需要重传每个丢失的数据包，导致额外的传输轮次和更高的延迟。论文旨在设计一种在保持带宽效率的同时显著降低传输延迟的协议。

Method: FLUID 采用喷泉编码（Fountain Coding）生成编码包，无需等待所有原始包到达即可完成交付。通过引入松弛参数ε控制冗余量，并基于Loss-Product Rule（丢包乘积规则）决定何时终止传输：当各轮次丢包率的乘积低于ε时交付完成。

Result: FLUID 在丢包网络中实现了显著更紧凑的交付延迟，能在少量轮次内完成传输，即使每轮都存在丢包。其带宽开销与最优ARQ之间的差距可通过ε精确控制。

Conclusion: FLUID 通过喷泉编码和受控冗余有效平衡了延迟与带宽效率，是面向丢包网络的一种低延迟传输新方案。

Abstract: We introduce FLUID (Fountain LiqUId Delivery), a protocol that uses fountain coding and receiver feedback for low-latency delivery of data blocks over lossy networks. Idealized Automatic Repeat reQuest (ARQ) protocols are bandwidth-optimal in the single-path setting, but must deliver every packet in a block and therefore can require additional rounds under packet loss. FLUID uses a controlled amount of slack to relax this all-packets requirement, allowing delivery to finish once enough encoded packets have been received. This yields substantially tighter delivery latency while remaining deterministically close to the ARQ bandwidth optimum.
  FLUID is controlled by a slack parameter $ε$. Under the Loss-Product Rule, delivery finishes once the product of packet loss fractions across transmission rounds falls below $ε$. Thus, FLUID can finish delivery in a small number of rounds even when every round experiences packet loss, while $ε$ controls the gap between FLUID and bandwidth-optimal ARQ.

</details>


### [417] [BShare: Packet Queueing Delay-Driven Buffer Sharing for Datacenter Switches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24178)
*Krishna Agarwal,Muhamad Rizka Maulana,Vamsi Addanki,Habib Mostafaei*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出BShare，一种基于数据包排队延迟的简单缓冲区共享机制，仅需单个可配置参数，在突发重负载下可将PowerTCP等传输协议的流完成时间性能提升高达45.07%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代数据中心交换机每端口每带宽单元的缓冲区可用性持续下降，现有缓冲区共享策略面临性能挑战。近期混合BM与AQM的方案虽有效但复杂度高，难以泛化和高效运行。

Method: BShare利用数据包排队延迟作为缓冲区共享的核心信号，仅需一个可配置参数即可实现缓冲区管理，避免了传统方案中多因素动态计算的复杂性。

Result: 仿真实验表明，在突发重载的数据中心工作负载下，与ABM相比，BShare将PowerTCP等高级传输协议的流完成时间性能提升了高达45.07%。

Conclusion: BShare作为一种简单高效的缓冲区共享机制，通过排队延迟信号实现了良好的性能，具有低复杂度和易部署的优势。

Abstract: Modern datacenter switches share packet buffers across ports to boost overall throughput and reduce packet loss. However, as buffer availability per-port-per-bandwidth unit continues to decrease, existing buffer-sharing strategies face increasing performance challenges. Recent efforts have attempted to integrate Buffer Management (BM) with Active Queue Management (AQM) to harness the advantages of both BM and AQM approaches to improve performance. While these hybrid solutions show promise, their complexity of dynamically calculating multiple factors for integration hinders generalization and efficiency. This paper presents BShare, a simple buffer sharing mechanism that uses packet queueing delay. BShare requires only a single operator-configurable parameter. Our simulation results show that BSHARE improves the flow completion time (FCT) performance of advanced transport protocols, such as PowerTCP, by up to 45.07% compared to ABM, particularly under burst-heavy datacenter workloads.

</details>


### [418] [Ant Backpressure Routing for Dynamic Wireless Multi-hop Networks with Mixed Traffic Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24235)
*Negar Erfaniantaghvayi,Zhongyuan Zhao,Kevin Chan,Ananthram Swami,Santiago Segarra*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出Ant-BP，一种将路由学习与数据包转发解耦的周期性全分布式路由方案。它利用虚拟SP-BP构建基于信息素的转发概率，而实际数据包通过每邻居FIFO队列转发，从而在保持吞吐量的同时缓解短生命周期流的饥饿问题，适应拓扑变化，并兼容基于每邻居FIFO转发的网络架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BP路由和SP-BP虽然能实现拥塞感知的多径资源分配，但依赖每流排队和逐时隙控制，难以在传统转发架构中实现；且SP-BP在短生命周期流与流媒体流共存时存在最后数据包问题（last-packet problem）。

Method: Ant-BP通过虚拟SP-BP定期更新信息素转发概率，实际数据包使用每邻居FIFO队列加概率下一跳选择转发，将路由学习与转发解耦。支持链路故障和移动性导致的拓扑变化适应。

Result: 相比传统ACO路由，Ant-BP以更低开销建立更优转发策略；相比SP-BP和ACO基线，在混合流媒体与突发流量下改善延迟和投递率；在中低负载下达到与SP-BP相当的吞吐量；对虚拟流量假设不匹配、链路故障和节点移动均具鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Ant-BP通过解耦路由学习和转发，结合虚拟SP-BP与FIFO队列，有效扩展了SP-BP的收益至实际网络架构，解决了短生命周期流饥饿问题，同时保持了鲁棒性和性能优势。

Abstract: Backpressure (BP) routing and its shortest-path biased variant (SP-BP) provide powerful congestion-aware multipath resource allocation for wireless multi-hop networks, but they rely on per-commodity queueing and slot-by-slot control that may be difficult to realize under practical or legacy forwarding architectures. Moreover, even state-of-the-art SP-BP still suffers from the last-packet problem when short-lived traffic coexists with streaming flows. To address these limitations, we propose Ant Backpressure (Ant-BP), a periodic and fully distributed routing scheme that decouples route learning from packet forwarding. Ant-BP uses virtual SP-BP to construct pheromone-based forwarding probabilities, while actual packets are forwarded through per-neighbor first-in-first-out (FIFO) queues with probabilistic next-hop selection. This architecture enables link-capacity sharing across commodities, mitigates starvation of short-lived traffic, and extends the benefits of SP-BP to network architectures based on per-neighbor FIFO forwarding. Through periodic virtual updates, Ant-BP also adapts to transient link failures and mobility-induced topology changes. Our theoretical analysis and simulations show that, compared with conventional ant colony optimization (ACO) routing, virtual SP-BP enables Ant-BP to establish higher-quality forwarding policies with lower overhead. As a result, Ant-BP improves latency and delivery ratio over SP-BP and ACO-based baselines under mixed streaming and bursty traffic, achieves throughput comparable to SP-BP at low and medium traffic load, and remains robust to mismatched virtual-traffic assumptions, transient link failures, and node mobility.

</details>


### [419] [RxGS: Receiver-Generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting for Radio-Frequency Data Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24290)
*Kang Yang,Mani Srivastava*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出RxGS，一个统一的接收器泛化模型，用于射频数据合成。通过两阶段学习（共享几何+条件辐射），支持多接收器联合训练与推理，大幅降低训练、推理和存储成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS方法只能针对固定接收器合成射频信号，多接收器场景需独立建模，无法预测未见接收器。作者旨在提出一个统一的接收器泛化模型。

Method: 两阶段学习：第一阶段学习共享的3D高斯几何（接收器无关）；第二阶段冻结几何，学习以接收器位置为条件的定向辐射。包含全局条件分支（场景级接收器效应）和局部分支（逐散射体几何遮挡变化）。配合多接收器CUDA光栅化器批量渲染。

Result: 在多个射频数据集上，RxGS以单一共享模型匹配或超越逐接收器基线，可泛化到训练中未见的接收器，训练成本降低45倍，推理成本降低7.6倍，存储成本降低N倍。

Conclusion: RxGS通过分离场景几何与接收器依赖的定向辐射，实现了高效、可泛化的多接收器射频合成，显著降低了资源开销。

Abstract: Radio-frequency (RF) data synthesis predicts the received signal given transmitter and receiver positions, and is essential for wireless applications. Recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)-based methods achieve efficient synthesis at any transmitter but only for a fixed receiver. Therefore, supporting $N$ receivers in one scene requires $N$ independent models and precludes prediction at unseen receivers. We present RxGS, which achieves receiver-generalizable synthesis within a single unified model. Our key insight is that scene geometry is receiver-independent while directional radiance is not: a first stage learns shared 3D Gaussian geometry, and a second stage freezes it and learns directional radiance conditioned on receiver position. A global conditioning branch captures shared receiver-dependent effects across the scene, while a local branch models per-scatterer variations from the receiver's geometry and occlusion. A multi-receiver CUDA rasterizer further batches rendering across all $N$ receivers. Evaluated across various RF datasets, RxGS matches or improves over per-receiver baselines with a single shared model and generalizes to receivers unseen during training within the scene, cutting training cost by up to $45\times$, inference cost by $7.6\times$, and storage by $N\times$.

</details>


### [420] [Network Digital Twin for Congestion-Aware Predictive Traffic Routing using Graph MPNNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24318)
*Umer Iqbal,Ashiq Anjum,Anthony S Conway,Mathias Kern,Anasol Pena Rios*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于网络数字孪生（NDT）和消息传递神经网络（MPNN）的实时路由框架，通过合成流量生成、图神经网络边分类和策略路由反馈，实现自适应、可扩展的拥塞感知流量优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统路由协议仅在性能下降后才做出反应，无法适应动态流量和拓扑变化，需要一种实时自适应、可扩展、不中断服务且能提供持续反馈的拥塞感知路由方案。

Method: 构建NDT镜像物理网络；使用Erdos-Renyi、Barabasi-Albert、Watts-Strogatz等图模型生成增量拓扑；合成流量模拟负载变化；MPNN基于局部顶点和全局网络行为对边分类；分类结果通过PBR协议命令反馈到各路由器以优化流量分布。

Result: NDT能够收集路由器与链路的性能指标，MPNN有效分类边状态，PBR反馈实现物理网络链路上的最优流量分配。

Conclusion: 该NDT+MPNN+PBR框架为电信网络提供了一种实时、可扩展、非侵入式的拥塞感知路由解决方案，有望替代传统被动式路由协议。

Abstract: Telecom networks scale with growing users and data-intensive applications, generating heavy traffic that causes congestion, reducing throughput, increasing delay, and raising computational costs. Traditional routing protocols act only after performance degradation, making them unsuitable for dynamic traffic and topological changes. Addressing these challenges requires a routing approach that adapts in real time, scales with network growth, operates without disrupting active services, and provides continuous feedback for congestion-aware traffic optimisation. The Network Digital Twin (NDT) addresses these needs by mirroring global network behaviour using Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) through bidirectional communication with the physical network. To align the NDT with physical network behaviour, synthetic traffic is generated with increasing load across topological structures that incrementally scale as routers are added. These topologies are created by graph-generating models such as Erdos-Renyi, Barabasi-Albert, and Watts-Strogatz, customised with vertex degree limitations. The NDT collects performance metrics from routers and links, and MPNNs classify edges based on local vertex and global network behaviours. Based on these classifications, feedback is sent as Policy-Based Routing (PBR) protocol commands to each router, enabling optimal traffic distribution across links of the physical network.

</details>


### [421] [Low-Altitude Wireless Networks: The Next Horizon of Wireless Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24368)
*Yuanhao Cui,Jiali Nie,Weijie Yuan,Fan Liu,Ziye Jia,Jie Xu,Zhiyong Feng,Mohamed-Slim Alouini*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了低空无线网络（LAWN）概念，将其从传统地面通信网络扩展为三维多功能网络，分析了其驱动力、架构和限制因素，揭示了空域容量与无线信道容量之间的耦合关系及内在极限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低空空域（0-3000米）被视为人类和机器活动的新空间域，现有地面通信网络无法满足三维空间中通信、感知与控制一体化需求，亟需一种全新的网络范式。

Method: 通过分析LAWN的关键驱动力、网络架构和限制因素，建立空域容量与无线信道容量之间的耦合关系，揭示空域管理的内在极限。

Result: 发现了空域容量与无线信道容量的耦合关系，明确了低空网络演进中的根本性挑战和机遇。

Conclusion: LAWN代表了从地面二维通信网络向三维多功能网络的范式转变，其成功需要解决空域与信道容量耦合带来的根本性限制。

Abstract: Low-altitude airspace, roughly defined as the region up to 3000 meters above ground level, is envisioned as a new spatial domain for daily human and machine activities. This article introduces the concept of the Low-Altitude Wireless Network (LAWN), which represents a paradigm shift from the current ground-based communication-only network to a three-dimensional (3D) multifunctional network. We analyze the key driving forces, network architecture, and limiting factors of LAWN, with a particular focus on the tight integration of communication, sensing, and control in highly dynamic airspace environments. By establishing the coupling between airspace capacity and wireless channel capacity, we reveal the intrinsic limits of airspace management and identify the fundamental challenges and opportunities associated with its evolution.

</details>


### [422] [Analysis of Altitude-Dependent Electronic Conspicuity in Cellular-Connected UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24656)
*Md Sharif Hossen,Vijay K. Shah,Ismail Guvenc*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了无人机高度对蜂窝网络中电子显影（EC）可靠性的影响，发现高度增加会导致多小区交互增强、干扰主导连接，并通过实测与仿真验证了一致的海拔相关趋势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机在蜂窝网络中运行时，高海拔导致视距增强，使其同时暴露于多个基站，产生强小区间干扰，威胁电子显影（EC）的可靠性，因此需要理解高度如何影响无线电环境。

Method: 采用系统级分析方法，使用空间和网络级度量（服务距离、关联行为、聚合接收功率），结合helikite频谱监测实验数据与仿真结果进行交叉验证。

Result: 海拔升高导致：多小区交互增强、邻近扇区主导性下降、连接由干扰主导；关联区域碎片化，链路性能变异性增大。实测与仿真虽存在实验条件差异，但呈现一致的海拔趋势。

Conclusion: 研究为设计海拔感知与干扰感知的蜂窝系统提供实践指导，以支持可靠的无人机运行。

Abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly integrated into cellular networks to support emerging Internet of Things (IoT) applications. In such settings, reliable communication is critical for electronic conspicuity (EC), enabling UAV detection and tracking in shared airspace. However, UAVs operate at elevated altitudes where enhanced line-of-sight (LOS) visibility leads to simultaneous exposure to multiple base stations, resulting in strong inter-cell interference. This article presents a system-level analysis of how UAV altitude influences the radio environment and affects EC reliability. Using spatial and network-level metrics, including serving distance, association behavior, and aggregate received power, we show that increasing altitude leads to stronger multi-cell interaction, reduced dominance of nearby sectors, and interference-dominated connectivity. These effects result in fragmented association regions and increased variability in link performance. The analysis is supported by measurement data from a helikite-based spectrum monitoring campaign and corresponding simulation results. Despite differences in experimental conditions, both approaches exhibit consistent altitude-dependent trends. These findings provide practical insights for designing altitude-aware and interference-aware cellular systems to support reliable UAV operation.

</details>


### [423] [OpenTwin: Digital Twin Driven Closed Loop KPM Inference and Control for Open RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24662)
*Md Sharif Hossen,Zifan Zhang,Dara Ron,Yuchen Liu,Vijay K. Shah*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: OpenTwin是一个基于O-RAN仿真器的数字孪生框架，通过XGBoost+RLS两步ML方法实现KPM高精度镜像（96%），支持AI模型在虚拟空间安全验证后部署到真实网络，显著降低能耗且不中断现网运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: O-RAN中ML驱动的xApp/rApp开发面临两个核心挑战：(i) 接口延迟导致的关键性能指标（KPM）数据稀缺；(ii) 直接在现网测试AI模型存在网络中断风险。亟需一种安全、数据高效的模型验证方案。

Method: 提出OpenTwin数字孪生框架，部署于非实时RIC内，基于开源ns-O-RAN-flexRIC模拟器和O1接口KPM流。采用两步ML方法：先利用XGBoost学习时变网络行为以生成模拟器配置参数，再通过时间感知递归最小二乘（RLS）连续校正孪生体与真实测量的KPM偏差；结合偏差感知评分机制自动触发重同步。

Result: 实验表明，OpenTwin对真实世界KPM的镜像精度达96%；以节能xApp为例，在虚拟空间验证控制策略后部署至物理网络，显著降低能耗且未中断现网运行。

Conclusion: OpenTwin有效解决了O-RAN中ML模型开发的数据稀缺和现网风险两大难题，为AI驱动的网络优化提供了安全、高保真的数字孪生验证平台。

Abstract: The open radio access network (O-RAN) RAN intelligent controller (RIC) hosts data-driven xApps and rApps to optimize network performance. However, two challenges hinder ML-driven xApp/rApp development: (i) key performance metric (KPM) data scarcity caused by interface latency, and (ii) network disruption risks when testing and validating AI models directly on live networks. We develop OpenTwin, a digital twin framework built on an open-source O-RAN simulator (ns-O-RAN-flexRIC) and KPM streaming via the O1 interface, deployed within the non-RT RIC. OpenTwin uses a two-step ML approach: an XGBoost model that learns time-varying network behavior to generate simulator configuration parameters, followed by a time-aware recursive least squares (RLS) tuner that continuously corrects KPM deviations between the twin and real-world measurements. A deviation-aware scoring mechanism monitors twin fidelity and automatically triggers resynchronization upon detecting network drift. We demonstrate OpenTwin with an energy-saving xApp that validates control policies in the virtual space before applying reconfigurations to the physical network. Experimental results show that OpenTwin mirrors real-world KPMs with up to 96% accuracy and enables the xApp to significantly reduce energy consumption without disrupting live operations.

</details>


### [424] [Altitude-Dependent RSRP and RSRQ Trade-offs in 5G NR UAV Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24669)
*Md Sharif Hossen,Vijay K. Shah,Ismail Guvenc*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究了5G NR网络中蜂窝连接无人机（UAV）在 altitude 变化下的传播与干扰特性，提出了符合3GPP标准的系统级仿真框架，并揭示了高空下从覆盖受限到干扰受限的关键转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 5G NR网络中的天线扇区下倾设计导致高空无人机与地面用户的传播和干扰条件显著不同，现有研究缺乏对高空无人机KPI（如RSRP、RSRQ、SINR）的一致性表征框架。

Method: 基于3GPP标准，构建多站点三扇区部署的系统级仿真框架，结合 realistic 天线方向图、概率性LOS/NLOS模型，对RSRP、RSRQ、SINR等KPI进行一致性表征。

Result: 高空无人机从覆盖受限转变为干扰受限；RSRP随海拔和站间距（ISD）升高而缓慢下降，但SINR因LOS导致的干扰增加而快速恶化；增大ISD可降低干扰从而改善SINR和RSRQ。

Conclusion: 高空无人机的性能受干扰影响显著，通过增大站间距（ISD）可缓解干扰问题，为5G NR网络支持无人机通信提供了设计指导。

Abstract: Cellular-connected unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in 5G NR networks experience propagation and interference conditions that vary significantly with altitude and differ substantially from those experienced by terrestrial users. This is primarily caused by the down-tilted antenna sectors in 5G NR networks, which cause UAVs to be served (and interfered with) by the sidelobes. In this paper, we develop a 3GPP-compliant system-level framework for the consistent characterization of key performance indicators (KPIs) such as reference signal received power (RSRP), reference signal received quality (RSRQ), and signal-to-interference-and-noise ratio (SINR) in a multi-site tri-sector deployment with realistic antenna patterns and probabilistic models for line-of-sight (LOS) and non-LOS (NLOS) conditions. Simulation results demonstrate that a critical transition for aerial users is experienced when going from coverage-limited to interference-limited conditions at higher altitudes. Although RSRP is affected by large-scale propagation characteristics and degrades gradually with increasing altitude and inter-site distance (ISD), SINR degrades much faster due to increased interference caused by LOS conditions. On the contrary, increasing ISD improves SINR and RSRQ due to lower interference, even as received power is reduced.

</details>


### [425] [B.O.D.Y.: Beyond-Overlay Deterministic topologY -- A Layer-2 Declarative Ground Truth for AIOps Pipelines under Fragmented Administrative Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24683)
*Matheus Marques,Carlos Alberto Malcher,Cledson de Sousa*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出B.O.D.Y.系统，通过融合非特权终端会话、OUI指纹、PoE遥测等多模态数据，在缺乏管理权限的多校园异构网络中重建物理拓扑，解决传统SNMP探测在分段管理环境下的失效问题，实测覆盖率达98%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AIOps环境面临拓扑漂移和黑盒非管理物理网段问题，传统Layer-2发现管道依赖统一的行政合作和SNMP轮询，在异构、多厂商、多租户覆盖基础设施中频繁失效。

Method: B.O.D.Y.绕过NP难的不完全地址转发表求解困境，构建多模态数据融合管道：协调通过非特权终端会话收集的临时MAC地址转发表、被动OUI指纹识别、PoE遥测数据，以及声明式状态存储，最终重建非管理物理网段拓扑并映射逻辑资产语义。

Result: 在UFF大学五个校区实测，成功解析530/541个注册边缘设备（覆盖率98%），证明确定性拓扑接地消除了概率性AIOps推理中"自信因果推断脱离物理现实"的关键失效模式。

Conclusion: 确定性拓扑接地为下游推理系统提供了不可变、可审计的物理真实来源，有效弥补了传统方法在分段管理边界下的拓扑发现空白。

Abstract: Modern AIOps environments operating within multi-campus institutional infrastructures suffer acutely from topological drift and black-box unmanaged physical network segments. Classical layer-2 discovery pipelines rely on uniform administrative cooperation and ubiquitous SNMP polling, which routinely fail in heterogeneous, multi-vendor, and multi-tenant overlay infrastructures. This paper introduces B.O.D.Y. (Beyond-Overlay Deterministic topologY), a deterministic structural grounding layer for AIOps ecosystems operating under fragmented administrative boundaries. B.O.D.Y. bypasses the NP-hard incomplete Address Forwarding Table (AFT) resolution dilemma by formalizing a multi-modal data fusion pipeline that orchestrates ephemeral MAC address forwarding tables collected via non-privileged terminal sessions, passive OUI fingerprinting, PoE telemetry, and declarative state storage. The resulting topology graph reconstructs unmanaged physical segments and maps logical asset semantics without administrative network privileges, providing downstream reasoning systems with an immutable, auditable source of physical ground truth. Evaluation across five campuses of the Universidade Federal Fluminense, resolving 530 of 541 registered edge devices, demonstrates that deterministic topological grounding eliminates a critical failure mode in prob bilistic AIOps reasoning: confident causal inference decoupled from physical reality.

</details>


### [426] [Scaling up Energy-Aware Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Mission-Oriented Drone Networks with Individual Reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24992)
*Changling Li,Ying Li*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于个体奖励函数的能量感知多智能体强化学习模型，用于解决无人机网络中的轨迹规划问题。实验表明，该模型在不同任务位置和长度下至少达到80%的成功率，在任务密度高时接近100%，并且相比共享奖励模型，在环境规模扩大时更具鲁棒性和能效优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体强化学习虽在无人机轨迹规划中有应用前景，但动态环境和有限电池容量仍是挑战，现有方法难以实现高效协同任务执行。

Method: 提出能量感知MARL模型，基于Deep Q-Networks (DQN)，采用由任务执行进度和无人机剩余电量驱动的个体奖励函数（individual reward functions）。

Result: 1) 不同任务位置和长度下至少80%成功率；2) 高任务密度时接近100%成功率；3) 相比共享奖励模型，在环境规模扩大时更鲁棒，能以更少步骤实现更高成功率，能效更优。

Conclusion: 个体奖励模式在环境规模扩大时展现明显优势，目标清晰度提升了能量效率和任务成功率，是一种有效的信用分配方案。

Abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has shown wide applicability in collaborative systems such as autonomous driving and smart cities for its ability of learning through interaction. With the recent development of drone networks, researchers have also applied MARL to address the trajectory planning problems. However, the dynamic environment and the limited battery capacity are still challenging for using MARL to achieve efficient collaborative task execution. In this paper, we propose an energy-aware MARL model as an attempt to tackle these challenges, leveraging Deep Q-Networks (DQN) with \emph{individual reward functions} driven by the task execution progress and the remaining battery of drones. We conduct a set of simulation studies for the proposed mode and compare it with the shared reward MARL~\cite{Li2022MARL} to explore the impact of credit assignment in MARL. The results indicate that our proposed model can achieve at least 80\% success rate regardless of the task locations and lengths. Similar to the shared reward mode, the individual reward mode can achieve a better success rate when the task density is high, and it can hit nearly a 100\% success rate when task density gets close to 40\%. The true advantage of our proposed model with individual reward is revealed when scaling up the environment. The comparison to the shared reward MARL shows that the our proposed model is more robust towards the change of the environment size and agent numbers. It can achieve higher success rate with fewer steps due to the clarity of the goal which improves energy efficiency even better.

</details>


### [427] [K8S Power Irrigation: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Performance-Aware Power Efficiency of Kubernetes Cloud-Native Microservices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25218)
*Zouhir Bellal,Laaziz Lahlou,Nadjia Kara,Timothy Murphy,Tan Phat Nguyen*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出K8SPI，一种基于分层强化学习的控制器，用于在Kubernetes环境中联合优化CPU核心和uncore频率，在保障延迟敏感型微服务性能的前提下降低节点功耗23-30%，性能违规率低于2-3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代云平台因AI应用普及面临电力需求激增，但现有功耗调控方法忽视了延迟敏感型微服务的性能需求和uncore资源竞争，导致功耗过度供给。迫切需要一种能兼顾性能保障与能效优化的解决方案。

Method: 提出K8SPI，采用分层强化学习（HRL）两阶段架构：粗粒度智能体快速缓解性能违规，细粒度智能体在满足性能要求后最小化功耗。结合硬件、Kubernetes和应用层遥测数据，自适应调整core和uncore频率。

Result: 在Kubernetes测试床上的实验表明，相比Linux performance调控器，K8SPI降低节点功耗23-30%，同时将性能违规率控制在2-3%以下，即使在严重uncore争用和动态负载波动下仍能保持稳定。

Conclusion: K8SPI通过分层强化学习有效解耦了性能保障与功耗优化目标，证明了在云原生环境中兼顾延迟敏感型微服务SLO和能效的可行性，为绿色云计算提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Modern cloud platforms are facing a sharp increase in power demand driven by the rapid adoption of AI-powered applications, making power optimization urgent under net-zero commitments and sustainability goals. Yet, reducing power in production remains challenging for latency-sensitive microservices, where performance violations directly affect user experience and operational risk. Such services exhibit heterogeneous workload characteristics and dynamic load patterns. In multi-tenant environments, contention on shared uncore resources, including last-level cache and memory bandwidth, can degrade performance, especially for memory-intensive workloads. As a safeguard, providers often run servers in performance mode, fixing core and uncore frequencies at high levels. Existing power governors largely ignore application-level performance requirements and uncore interference, leading to systematic power over-provisioning. To address this, we introduce K8SPI, a hierarchical reinforcement learning controller that jointly optimizes CPU core and uncore frequencies for cloud-native deployments. K8SPI uses a two-stage architecture: a coarse-grained agent rapidly mitigates performance violations, while a fine-grained agent minimizes power once requirements are satisfied. Using telemetry from hardware, Kubernetes, and application layers, K8SPI adapts to workload heterogeneity and cross-microservice interference. We evaluate K8SPI on a Kubernetes testbed across multiple scenarios. Results show that K8SPI reduces node-level power by 23--30\% compared with the Linux performance governor while keeping performance requirement violations below 2--3\%, even under severe uncore contention and dynamic load fluctuations.

</details>


### [428] [TIP: A Decentralized Intent-Based Protocol for Declarative IoT Interoperability and Sandboxed Schema Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25332)
*Yeison David Mejia Mosquera*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出TIP协议，通过去中心化、声明式的方式解决异构IoT系统的碎片化问题，支持运行时模式翻译、混合节点发现、多标准评分选择和WASM沙箱安全执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IoT协议（MQTT、COAP、DDS等）基于地址绑定的命令式路由模型，需要硬编码配置且缺乏运行时模式转换能力，无法解决异构硬件架构、网络协议栈和数据序列化格式带来的碎片化问题。

Method: 节点提交声明式意图（能力、模式、QoS约束），TIP引擎通过mDNS+Kademlia DHT混合发现机制匹配节点，采用多标准评分（延迟、信誉、合规性）优化选择，在WASM沙箱中动态编译TOML规范实现运行时数据转换，使用Ed25519+X25519+ChaCha20-Poly1305保障安全。

Result: Rust和C++参考实现评估显示：亚毫秒级的运行时模式转换开销，在工业条件下具备鲁棒性。

Conclusion: TIP协议通过声明式意图和动态WASM沙箱方案，有效解决了异构IoT系统的互联互通问题，兼具性能和安全优势。

Abstract: Heterogeneous Internet of Things (IoT) systems suffer from fragmentation across hardware architectures, networking stacks, and data serialization formats. Existing standards (such as MQTT, COAP, and DDS) rely on address-bound, imperative routing models that require hardcoded configurations and leave no flexibility for runtime schema translation. This paper presents TIP (The Intent Protocol), a decentralized, declarative network protocol. Instead of addressing specific physical endpoints, nodes submit abstract intents specifying desired capabilities, schemas, and Quality of Service (QoS) constraints. The TIP Engine resolves matching nodes using a hybrid discovery mechanism combining local multicast DNS (mDNS) with Kademlia Distributed Hash Tables (DHT). Selection is optimized via a multi-criteria scoring algorithm incorporating network latency, historical reputation, and contract compliance. Mismatched data representations are reconciled on-the-fly inside isolated WebAssembly (WASM) sandboxes compiled dynamically from TOML specifications. Security is enforced through Ed25519 signatures, X25519 key exchanges, and ChaCha20-Poly 1305 payload encryption. Evaluation of our reference implementation in Rust and C++ shows sub-millisecond translation overhead and robust resilience under industrial conditions.

</details>


### [429] [Mode 0: A New 3GPP V2X Resource Allocation Category for Roadside Computing Unit-Assisted Safety Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25431)
*Dewei Jiang,Xiang Gu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文指出现有3GPP V2X资源分配框架（基站调度+UE自主）存在结构性缺陷：基站调度在高密度下出现延迟尾失败，UE自主无法处理遮挡预警和大范围环境危害。作者提出Mode 0，以路侧计算单元（RCU）为核心，集成感知、通信与计算，涵盖Mode 0a至0c子系列。中国与欧美部署证据显示正收敛于此方向，MAPPO仿真验证Mode 0c实现严格帕累托改进，满足延迟安全需求。建议3GPP在NR-V2X中启动Mode 0研究项目。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3GPP V2X的二元分类（基站/UE）存在结构性不完备：基站调度在高密度下产生延迟尾失败，UE自主模式无法应对遮挡预警和大范围环境危害，无法满足V2X安全场景的根本需求。

Method: 提出Mode 0架构：以路侧计算单元（RCU）为核心，集成Elevated Sensing（Seeing）、Sidelink Communication（Speaking）、Local Computation Evaluation（Thinking）。定义从Mode 0a（全部被动UE，保证最低）到Mode 0c（全部主动UE，最优目标）的子系列谱。使用MAPPO多智能体强化学习进行十五轮仿真验证。

Result: Mode 0a位于对称纳什协调下限；Mode 0c实现严格帕累托改进——M0 PDR 0.999, M1 PDR 0.998 (ρ_pool ≤ 1)，最差TTI交付率从近0提升至0.601，是唯一满足延迟安全要求的配置。

Conclusion: 现有框架结构性不完备，Mode 0是必要的新类别。中国与欧美C-V2X项目已在实践中收敛于路侧节点方案。呼吁3GPP在NR-V2X sidelink增强工作计划中启动Mode 0研究项目。

Abstract: The 3GPP V2X resource allocation framework defines two entity classes -- the base station and the vehicle UE -- and four modes across LTE and NR generations. We demonstrate that this binary taxonomy is structurally incomplete. Base station-led scheduling saturates at high-density traffic nodes, producing latency-tail failures that persist even when mean packet delivery ratios approach the service-class target. UE autonomy is categorically incapable of pre-emergence warning for occluded traffic participants and insufficient for large-scope cascading environmental hazards. We propose Mode 0, a new 3GPP V2X category whose defining entity is the Roadside Computing Unit (RCU) -- an infrastructure ensemble integrating elevated sensing (Seeing), sidelink communication (Speaking), and local computational evaluation (Thinking), owned by traffic management authorities. Mode 0 defines a subfamily spectrum from Mode 0a (all-passive UEs, the guaranteed minimum) through Mode 0c (all-active UEs, the optimal target). Convergent deployment evidence from Chinese national standards (DB11/T 2329.1-2024, T/ITS 0224.1-2025), China Unicom RS-MEC infrastructure, and European and US C-V2X programs confirms that both institutional sides are converging on the roadside traffic node without a coordination standard. A fifteen-run Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) simulation validates the architectural family: Mode 0a in shared-pool baseline sits at the analytical symmetric-Nash coordination floor; Mode 0c with demand separation achieves strict Pareto improvement for both traffic classes (M0 PDR 0.999, M1 PDR 0.998 at $ρ_{\rm pool} \leq 1$) and lifts the worst-TTI delivery ratio from near-zero to 0.601 -- the only configuration satisfying the latency safety requirement structurally. We call for a 3GPP study item on Mode 0 within the NR-V2X sidelink enhancement work programme.

</details>


### [430] [Leveraging Multi-Step Traffic Forecasts for Multi-Period Planning Optical Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25573)
*Giannis Savva,Hafsa Maryam,Venkatesh Chebolu,Tania Panayiotou,Georgios Ellinas*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文利用多步流量预测实现可重构光网络的多周期规划，通过编码器-解码器深度学习模型预测流量，结合ILP和启发式算法在频谱效率与服务中断之间取得平衡，实验表明ILP效果最优而启发式算法接近ILP且运行时间更短。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可重构光网络中频繁的网络重配置会导致服务中断，如何在适应时变流量条件、节省频谱资源的同时，尽量减少服务中断是核心动机。

Method: 采用编码器-解码器深度学习模型进行多步流量预测，并基于预测结果构建整数线性规划（ILP）和启发式算法，主动（重）优化未来网络配置。

Result: ILP在所有场景下取得最优解，启发式算法接近ILP性能且运行时间显著降低。预测时长的选择对服务中断和资源过/欠配置有显著影响，取决于运营商目标和服务水平协议。

Conclusion: 多步流量预测能有效平衡光网络中的频谱效率与服务中断，预测时长的选取需根据运营商的具体性能目标和SLA要求来权衡。

Abstract: In this work, multi-step traffic predictions are leveraged to enable multi-period planning in reconfigurable optical networks. The proposed framework aims to achieve spectrum savings by adapting the network to predicted time-varying conditions while ensuring the necessary quality-of-service (QoS) levels. Since frequent network (re)configurations may lead to undesired service disruptions, traffic predictions spanning various prediction horizons are exploited to balance the trade-off between spectrum savings and service disruptions. For multi-step-ahead prediction, an encoder-decoder deep learning model is employed to analyze real traffic traces. Subsequently, an Integer Linear Programming (ILP) formulation and heuristic algorithms are developed that use the predictions to proactively (re)optimize future network configurations, enhancing spectrum efficiency while minimizing service disruptions. The approaches are utilized under different scenarios, with the ILP achieving better solutions overall, and the heuristics achieving solutions close to the ILP at significantly lower running times. Further, the results present the effect of the prediction horizon on disruptions and over- and under- provisioning, showcasing that the prediction horizon selection greatly depends on the network operator targets in both network performance and predefined service level agreements.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [431] [Humans Cannot Detect AI-Generated Media But Communities May -- For Now: Collaborative AI Detection in r/RealOrAI on Reddit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24287)
*Tuğrulcan Elmas*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文研究了Reddit社区r/RealOrAI中人类对AI生成内容的检测行为。社区检测准确率为72%，存在系统性假阳性偏差且随时间加剧。对10k条评论分析发现，感知特征（70%）是最主要的推理依据，而溯源验证（4%）虽最少被个体使用但在社区摘要中被放大4.3倍，表明聚合机制能选择性突出诊断性证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于AI检测器的技术性能，缺乏对大规模、自然场景下人类AI检测行为的系统性理解。作者利用Reddit真实社群数据，探究人类如何感知和判断AI生成内容及其行为模式。

Method: 使用r/RealOrAI社区一年的活动数据，通过“[GUESS]”帖子获取自然标注；采用六LLM集成模型对人类注释的10k条评论按六类线索（感知特征、上下文、一致性、AI知识、专业知识、溯源）进行分类分析。

Result: 社区检测准确率72%，存在系统性假阳性偏差且随时间加剧；感知特征主导推理（70%），溯源验证最少（4%）但在社区摘要中被放大4.3倍。

Conclusion: 揭示了基于启发式检测的局限性，展示了在线社区如何在充满争议的信息环境中通过集体聚合机制筛选诊断性证据。

Abstract: We study human AI-detection behaviour at scale using a year of activity from r/RealOrAI, a Reddit community where users collaboratively assess whether visual media is real or AI-generated. The community is moderated by a bot that solicits verified labels from submitters of self-challenging "[GUESS]" posts and publishes an aggregate community prediction for each post, yielding naturalistic ground truth at scale. Community detection accuracy reaches 72% on [GUESS] posts with a systematic false-positive bias that intensifies over the year as the community's AI-suspicion grows. Using a six-LLM ensemble validated against human-annotated ground truth, we classify 10k reasoning-bearing comments along six cues covering perceptual features, context, consistency, AI knowledge, subject-matter expertise and provenance (tracing the media to its source). Perceptual features (scene, visual artifacts, anatomy physics, lighting, behavior, text, audio) dominate reasoning (70%) while provenance verification is rarest (4%) at the individual level but is amplified 4.3x in community summaries, revealing aggregation as a reliability filter that selectively surfaces diagnostic evidence. These findings reveal the limits of heuristic-based detection and show how online communities collectively navigate an increasingly contested information environment.

</details>


### [432] [Generalized L-Modularity for Community Detection Beyond Simple Temporal Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24450)
*Victor Brabant,Angela Bonifati,Remy Cazabet*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的动态社区检测框架，能够处理时间网络中多种类型的交互（瞬时事件、持续接触、延迟交互、有向、加权、多部结构等），解决了现有方法只能处理有限特征且依赖简化变换导致信息丢失的问题。实验证明该方法能发现有意义的时间社区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有社区检测方法在处理时间网络时只能处理有限的特征子集（如仅处理瞬时事件或忽略方向、权重等），且常依赖聚合时间窗口、投影多部图等简化变换，导致信息丢失。因此需要一种能统一处理多种交互模态和时间动态的社区检测方法。

Method: 将纵向模块度（L-Modularity）和LAGO算法推广到一个统一的框架中，用于复杂链接流中的动态社区检测，能够处理瞬时事件、持续接触、延迟交互、有向、加权以及多节点类型等多样化的交互类型。

Result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，该方法能够在具有多种交互类型的时间网络中发现有意义的社区结构。

Conclusion: 该统一框架有效克服了现有方法在时间网络社区检测中的局限性，能够更完整地保留原始数据中的信息，发现更具意义的社区结构。

Abstract: Detecting communities in networks is essential for understanding the mesoscopic organization of complex systems. Interactions in most real-world networks evolve over time and exhibit diverse modalities: instantaneous events, continuous contacts that persist over intervals, and delayed interactions where source and destination are temporally separated, as observed in transportation processes. Additionally, interactions may be directed, weighted, or involve multiple node types. Existing methods for community detection in temporal networks typically handle only limited subsets of these features. When applied to real-world data, they often rely on simplifying transformations, such as aggregating interactions into time windows, projecting multipartite structures onto unipartite graphs, or ignoring edge directions and weights, leading to a loss of information. In this work, we generalize Longitudinal Modularity (L-Modularity) and the LAGO algorithm into a unified framework for dynamic community detection in complex link streams. Experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach discovers meaningful communities in temporal networks with diverse interaction types.

</details>


### [433] [Same View, Different Visions -- Visual Nature Content on Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24493)
*Oliver Mel Allen,Johannes Langemeyer,Ramin Soleymani-Fard*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了社交媒体上自然美学的挪用现象，指出数字自然价值可能被右翼民粹主义和化石燃料产业利用，阻碍可持续转型。研究计划结合NLP、图像聚类和网络话语分析，分析自然视觉美学的当前状态及其政治生态影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体上的自然美学可能被逆向挪用，服务于反对可持续转型的政治力量（如右翼民粹运动、化石燃料产业），而生成式AI工具的普及加剧了这一风险。当前对此现象的研究尚不充分。

Method: 三部分混合方法：（1）自然语言处理分析文本；（2）图像聚类分析视觉内容；（3）网络话语分析揭示挪用、自然价值观与政治生态之间的交叉关系。

Result: 尚属进行中的工作，未报告具体结果。提出假设：自然美学正日益被挪用，以维持现状并推动对抗变革的意识形态。

Conclusion: 需警惕社交媒体上自然美学被政治化挪用的风险，为理解数字时代环境价值观与政治生态的互动提供分析框架。

Abstract: Digital nature values formed through online interactions with nature might incentivize new types of environmental stewardship, but these values may also be appropriated by those who seek to undermine sustainable transformation, such as right-wing populist movements and fossil fuel industries. Specific aesthetics and visual cultures may be appropriated, borrowing their credibility or influence, and layers of platform affordances, internet cultures, and norms add additional complexities to visual communication of nature on social media. Research on this phenomenon is especially important as generative AI tools for photos and video are made readily available to social media users and far-right political ecology is rapidly evolving. In this ongoing work we ask the following research question: What is the current state of visual nature aesthetics on social media? Hereby, we follow the hypothesis that nature aesthetics are increasingly appropriated to uphold the status quo and potentially push ideologies countering transformative change. The proposed study includes three parts which strategically combine natural language processing, image clustering, and networked discourse analysis to illuminate the intersection of online aesthetic appropriation, nature values, and political ecology.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [434] [From Accuracy to Auditability: A Survey of Determinism in Financial AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23955)
*Ruizhe Zhou,Xiaoyang Liu,Gaoyuan Du,Yi Zheng,Shouxi Ren,Deepayan Chakrabarti,Dengdu Jiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了金融AI中的算法可复现性问题，涵盖表格模型、图神经网络和LLM三种模态，并通过实验量化了不同场景下的复现失败程度，提出了分层评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在受监管的金融环境中，机器学习（尤其是深度神经网络和生成式AI）存在机械非确定性，导致算法结果不可复现，威胁审计合规性。现有研究多关注统计过拟合，但对硬件/架构导致的非确定性缺乏系统性梳理。

Method: 采用文献综述+实验验证的方式：1）从系统视角分三类模态（表格模型、图网络、LLM代理工作流）分析复现性失败原因；2）在公开金融数据集上进行量化实验，测量解释排名不稳定性、预测翻转率、张量并行导致的输出分歧等指标；3）提出分层评估框架，将模态特定指标（RBO、D_cos、TDI、PSD）与审计就绪度关联，并验证logit级与语义级确定性指标的互补性。

Result: 通过实验量化了金融AI中三类模态的复现失败：信用评分中解释排名不稳定、GNN欺诈检测中的预测翻转率、LLM实体提取中张量并行引发的输出分歧，并实证了不同层次确定性指标间的互补关系。

Conclusion: 提出一个分层评估框架，将模态特定指标映射到审计就绪度，可系统性评估和提升金融AI的可复现性，为合规部署提供指导。

Abstract: Deploying machine learning in regulated financial environments -- credit risk, fraud detection, and anti-money laundering -- exposes critical vulnerabilities in algorithmic reproducibility. While early financial ML addressed statistical challenges such as backtest overfitting, deep neural networks and Generative AI have introduced mechanical nondeterminism rooted in hardware and architecture. This survey provides a systems perspective on reproducibility failures across three modalities now dominant in financial AI: tabular models (post-hoc explanation variance), graph networks (stochastic sampling and temporal asynchrony), and LLM-based agentic workflows (batch-dependent divergence and trajectory drift). We supplement the literature analysis with first-party experiments on public financial datasets -- quantifying explanation rank instability in credit scoring, prediction flip rates in GNN-based fraud detection, and tensor-parallel-induced output divergence in LLM entity extraction. We propose a layered evaluation framework linking modality-specific metrics (RBO, D_cos, TDI, PSD) to audit readiness, and empirically validate the complementarity of logit-level and semantic-level determinism measures.

</details>


### [435] [In Search of the Ingredients of Open-Endedness: Replicating Picbreeder with Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23908)
*Sam Earle,Kay Arulkumaran,Andrew Dai,Akarsh Kumar,Julian Togelius,Sebastian Risi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文通过用视觉语言模型替代人类用户复现Picbreeder平台，研究AI在开放式创意生成中的能力，发现AI与人类输出存在明显差异，并探索了噪声、行为多样性和记忆等影响因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究人工智能体是否具备像人类一样进行开放式、无引导的创造性发现的能力，即能否在无人干预的情况下持续生成新颖且有意义的产物。

Method: 复现Picbreeder平台，用前沿视觉语言模型替代人类用户进行交互式进化；通过添加探索性噪声、智能体行为多样性、以及行为记忆（叙事动量）来研究影响输出差异的因素；使用系统发育复杂度、视觉和语义显著性与新颖性等指标进行定量分析。

Result: AI系统与人类基线在输出上存在明显的定性差异；通过引入探索噪声、行为多样性和记忆机制，可以在一定程度上改变AI的生成行为。

Conclusion: 当前AI在开放式创造性发现中与人类仍存在差距，但通过设计适当的机制（如噪声、多样性、记忆）可以调节其行为，为未来构建更具创造性的AI系统提供方向。

Abstract: We are in the midst of large-scale industrial and academic efforts to automate the processes of scientific, technological and creative production through AI-driven assistants. Historically, a fundamental property of these processes in their human form has been their open-endedness: their capacity for generating a seemingly endless supply of novel and meaningful new forms. Do artificial agents have any capacity for such fruitful unguided discovery? To answer this question, we turn to Picbreeder, the canonical exemplar of human-driven open-ended search, in which users collaboratively generated a diverse library of images through interactive evolution of small neural networks. We replicate Picbreeder, replacing human users with frontier Vision Language Models (VLMs). We observe clear qualitative differences between the output of our system and the historical human baseline, and attempt to characterize them using metrics of phylogenetic complexity and visual and semantic salience and novelty. In an effort to identify some of the causal factors contributing these differences, we study the addition of exploratory noise to the agents' selection process, of behavioral diversity between agents, and of narrative momentum in the form of memory of past actions. We make our code available at https://github.com/smearle/picbreeder-vlm.

</details>


### [436] [Saturating Scaling Laws for Equational Discovery: A Phenomenology of Growth Dynamics in Three Toy Substrates with Two Real-World Replications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23983)
*Fabio Rovai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了确定性等式发现基板中的增长动力学。在三个玩具领域（算术、布尔、高阶列表，n=592条轨迹）中，短程基板大小符合幂律N(t) ∝ t^b。每个基板内b对架构敏感（交叉验证R²≈0.82），但回归不能跨基板迁移（算术+布尔到列表得到R²≈-0.84）。一个启发式平均场闭包模型预测了饱和幂律dN/dt = K N^k exp(-μN)，纯幂律是其短程近似。四项鲁棒性检验结果不一：对现实世界两个增长代理（mathlib4文件增长支持饱和形式，Coq mathcomp提交支持纯幂律），表明动力学在两层条件上依赖基板。提出"具有基板条件依赖(k, μ)的饱和幂律增长，当基板达到饱和状态时可观测"作为工作框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解确定性等式发现系统中增长动力学的普遍规律，探究是否存在跨领域统一的增长模式，以及基板特异性如何影响增长动态。

Method: 在三个玩具领域（算术、布尔、高阶列表）收集592条轨迹数据，使用幂律拟合短程增长；构建平均场闭包模型预测饱和幂律；通过bootstrap区间、样本外预测、真实世界数据（mathlib4文件增长和Coq mathcomp提交）进行鲁棒性检验。

Result: 短程内基板大小符合幂律，b对架构敏感（R²≈0.82）但跨基板不迁移（R²≈-0.84）；玩具数据未达到饱和，纯幂律在样本外预测中胜出；真实数据结果分裂：mathlib4支持饱和幂律（样本外预测提升约7倍），Coq mathcomp支持纯幂律（μ趋近于零）。

Conclusion: 增长动力学具有两层基板条件依赖性：架构到b的回归不跨基板迁移，且增长函数本身（纯幂律vs饱和幂律）因基板而异。提出"饱和幂律增长"作为工作框架，强调其参数(k, μ)的基板条件依赖性。

Abstract: We investigate growth dynamics in deterministic equational discovery substrates. Across three toy domains (arithmetic, boolean, higher-order list; n=592 trajectories), short-range substrate sizes fit a power-law N(t) proportional to t^b. Within each substrate b is architecture-sensitive (cross-validated R^2 approximately 0.82); the regression does not transfer across substrates (arith+bool to list yields R^2 approximately -0.84). A heuristic mean-field closure model predicts a saturating power-law dN/dt = K N^k exp(-mu N) of which the pure power-law is the short-range approximation. Three robustness checks: bootstrap intervals on (k, mu) are tight in 4/5 toy trajectories and degenerate in 1/5; out-of-sample forecasting on toy data (fit first 100 epochs, predict next 400) is won by pure power-law 5/5, indicating the toy trajectories do not reach saturation; on two real-world growth proxies the result splits. New Mathlib/*.lean file additions per month (mathlib4, 60 months, 9701 files) support the saturating form on OOS forecasting by approximately 7x over pure power-law; Coq mathcomp monthly commits (129 months, 3083 commits) favour pure power-law on both tests with mu collapsing to zero. The dynamics are substrate-conditional at two levels: within-substrate architecture-to-b regressions do not transfer, and the preferred functional family for N(t) itself (pure vs. saturating power-law) differs by substrate. We propose "saturating power-law growth with substrate-conditional (k, mu), observable when the substrate has reached its saturation regime" as a working framing.

</details>


### [437] [Confidence Calibration in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23909)
*Noam Michael,Daniel BenShushan,Jacob Bien,Don A. Moore*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在不同任务上的置信度校准问题。预注册实验表明，LLMs与人类类似，普遍存在过度自信（置信度高于准确率），但这种倾向受"困难-简单效应"调节：困难测试中过度自信最严重，简单测试中则显著缺乏自信。作者还开发了LifeEval测试来评估不同难度水平上的模型校准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型在不同难度任务上的置信度校准情况，即模型对其回答的自信程度是否与实际准确率相匹配。

Method: 通过预注册研究设计，系统性地比较LLMs的置信度与准确率，并开发了LifeEval测试集用于评估不同难度水平下的校准效果。

Result: LLMs普遍过度自信（置信度高于准确率），但存在"困难-简单效应"：困难测试中过度自信最严重，简单测试中则表现为缺乏自信。

Conclusion: LLMs的置信度校准问题与人类类似，且受任务难度显著影响，需要针对不同难度水平改进校准方法。

Abstract: We investigate the calibration of large language models' (LLMs') confidence across diverse tasks. The results of our preregistered study show that the current crop of LLMs are, like people, too sure they are right: confidence exceeds accuracy, on average. Importantly, however, this tendency is moderated by a powerful hard-easy effect, wherein overconfidence is greatest on difficult tests; by contrast, easy tests actually show substantial underconfidence. We develop LifeEval, a test for evaluating model calibration across levels of difficulty.

</details>


### [438] [How Much Thinking is Enough? Quantifying and Understanding Redundancy in LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23926)
*Zhiyuan Zhai,Xinkai You,Wenjing Yan,Xin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文量化了推理大语言模型中的推理冗余度（61%-93%），并从第一性原理证明了这种冗余是长度无关的结果奖励的结构性必然产物，而非模型特定缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理模型虽然能力强大，但产生长链思维耗费大量延迟、GPU时间和能源。现有研究从未大规模量化这些推理过程有多大比例是真正必要的，也缺乏从第一性原理的理论解释。

Method: 提出"推理冗余度"形式化定义：正确迹中可被截断的最大尾部比例，使模型被迫终止思考后仍能输出正确结果。在4个前沿推理模型和2个数学基准上进行大规模量化，并从理论上证明长度无关的结果奖励必然导致无限期望停止时间非最优。

Result: 8个（模型, 基准）条件下冗余度在61%-93%之间，6个条件下中位数关键前缀仅为一个分段步骤；该结果对评判模型族鲁棒；MATH-500上冗余度随问题难度增加而下降，但即使在最难的Level-5上冗余度仍高达46%-85%。

Conclusion: 推理冗余是长度无关结果奖励的结构性后果，而非模型特定缺陷。无论RL算法、基础模型、数据分布或策略来源如何，过度思考是当前推理模型训练方式的固有属性。

Abstract: Reasoning-capable large language models solve hard problems by emitting long chains of thought, paying heavily in latency, GPU time, and energy. Casual inspection of their traces reveals extensive reformulation, verification, and circular self-reflection, yet how much of this deliberation is actually necessary has never been measured at scale or explained from first principles. This paper closes both gaps.
  We formalise reasoning redundancy directly in terms of the reasoning model itself: the redundancy of a correct trace is the largest fraction of its trailing segmented steps that can be truncated while $π$, forced to terminate thinking and emit a final answer, still produces the correct answer. A large-scale quantification across four frontier reasoning models and two mathematical benchmarks shows that step-level redundancy is consistently high -- between 61% and 93% across the 8 (model, benchmark) conditions we study, with the median critical prefix equal to a single segmented step in six of the eight conditions -- that the finding is robust to the choice of judge family, and that although $ρ$ decreases with problem difficulty on MATH-500, all four models remain substantially redundant ($ρ\in [46\%, 85\%]$) even on the hardest Level-5 problems.
  We then prove that this redundancy is a structural consequence of length-agnostic outcome rewards, not a model-specific artefact: under any such reward, no finite expected stopping time is optimal. The result holds regardless of RL algorithm, base model, data distribution, or whether the policy is obtained via RL or distillation; over-thinking is therefore not a bug to be patched in individual models but a structural property of how current reasoning models are trained. Code: https://github.com/zhiyuanZhai20/how-much-thinking-is-enough

</details>


### [439] [Context: Proactive Goal-Directed Intelligence via Composable Sandboxed Programs, Declarative Wiring, and Structured Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23928)
*Gregory Magarshak*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Magarshak架构的智能层Context，用主动目标导向代理替代被动问答聊天机器人，通过写时上下文组装、可组合沙盒智慧程序、主动目标流状态机三个机制实现，并证明了六个形式化定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统反应式聊天机器人需要用户每次主动提示才能推进对话，效率低下且无法主动推动共享任务。本文旨在设计一种能主动推进目标、无需等待用户输入的智能代理架构。

Method: 三个核心机制：1) 写时上下文组装（通过Groker代理预计算富类型属性，实现KV缓存近100%复用）；2) 可组合沙盒智慧程序（LM生成的命令式程序，通过类型流关系声明式接入目标类型）；3) 主动目标流状态机（通过检查图状态主动发出交互内容，无需等待用户输入）。

Result: 证明了六个形式化定理：上下文稳定性定理（每次LM调用成本与语义变化率相关）、程序组合正确性定理、声明式接线可靠性定理、主动主导定理（主动代理在期望到达终端状态轮次上弱主导被动代理）、协调开销消除与质量保持定理（多参与者目标聊天中的帕累托改进）、跨平台投票一致性定理。

Conclusion: 通过Qbix/Safebox/Safebots开源栈实现，证明了该架构在效率和正确性上的理论保证，为构建主动式、可组合、形式化可验证的智能代理系统提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We present Context, the intelligence layer of the Magarshak Architecture, which replaces reactive query-response chatbots with proactive goal-directed agents that advance shared tasks without waiting for user prompts. The architecture rests on three mutually reinforcing mechanisms. Write-time context assembly precomputes enriched typed attributes via Groker agents, assembling interaction context as a deterministic pure function of graph state; context blocks are byte-identical across turns between semantic changes, enabling near-100% KV-cache reuse. Composable sandboxed wisdom programs form a governed library of LM-generated imperative programs declaratively wired to goal types via typed stream relations, composed via phase ordering, and executed at interaction time without further LM calls. Proactive goal stream state machines drive conversations toward terminal states by inspecting graph state and emitting structured interaction content (option arrays, governance affordances, clarification prompts) without awaiting user input. We prove six formal results: the Context Stability Theorem, bounding per-turn LM cost as a function of semantic change rate; a Program Composition Correctness Theorem; a Declarative Wiring Soundness Theorem; the Proactive Dominance Theorem, proving proactive agents weakly dominate reactive agents on expected turns-to-terminal-state; Coordination Overhead Elimination and Quality Preservation, establishing Pareto improvements in multi-participant goal chats; and a Cross-Platform Vote Consistency Theorem. Implemented in the open-source Qbix / Safebox / Safebots stack.

</details>


### [440] [Toward Reliable Design of LLM-Enabled Agentic Workflows: Optimizing Latency-Reliability-Cost Tradeoffs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23929)
*Ya-Ting Yang,Quanyan Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了由LLM代理和传统计算模块组成的多代理工作流中延迟、可靠性和成本之间的基本权衡，提出了性能模型，并推导出在延迟和成本约束下的最优token分配策略（水填充策略）和工作流可靠性特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AI系统越来越依赖由多个交互代理组成的工作流，其中一些由大语言模型驱动，另一些由传统计算模块驱动。如何在这类混合代理工作流中平衡延迟、可靠性和成本是一个关键但尚未被充分研究的问题。

Method: 1) 提出了LLM代理和非LLM代理的性能模型，用参数指数可靠性函数刻画LLM代理的计算投入与输出质量之间的关系。2) 在延迟和成本约束下研究顺序工作流的设计。3) 推导出水填充token分配策略。4) 用影子价格表征最优工作流可靠性。

Result: 提出了水填充token分配策略，以及用影子价格表征的最优工作流可靠性。

Conclusion: 本文为设计高效的LLM代理工作流提供了理论指导，通过水填充策略和影子价格框架，帮助在延迟和成本约束下优化工作流可靠性。
